# Vježba 9 — Idealni Bernoulli

## Fizikalni uvod: Bernoullijeva jednadžba

Bernoullijeva jednadžba predstavlja **zakon o očuvanju specifične energije** za strujanje idealnog (nestlačivog i neviskoznog) fluida. Ona nam kazuje da je ukupna mehanička energija duž strujnice konstantna, iako se njezini oblici mogu neprestano transformirati jedan u drugi.

Izražena u metrima stupca tekućine, jednadžba povezuje tlak, brzinu i položaj:
$$\frac{p_1}{\rho g} + \frac{v_1^2}{2g} + z_1 = \frac{p_2}{\rho g} + \frac{v_2^2}{2g} + z_2 = H = \text{const.}$$

Svaki član jednadžbe predstavlja specifičnu energetsku "visinu":
*   $\frac{p}{\rho g}$ [m] – **Piezometrijska (tlačna) visina**: Energija uslijed statičkog tlaka.
*   $\frac{v^2}{2g}$ [m] – **Brzinska (dinamička) visina**: Kinetička energija strujanja.
*   $z$ [m] – **Geodetska visina**: Potencijalna energija položaja u gravitacijskom polju.

Ključni inženjerski uvid Bernoullijevog principa je taj da u sustavima s konstantnom geodetskom visinom, **povećanje brzine strujanja nužno dovodi do pada tlaka**. Linija koja prati zbroj geodetske i tlačne visine naziva se **HGL (Hydraulic Grade Line)**, dok linija ukupne energije (uključujući brzinsku visinu) čini **EGL (Energy Grade Line)**. Kod idealnog fluida, EGL je uvijek horizontalna linija jer nema gubitaka energije na trenje ili viskozni otpor.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- NOVI WIDGET: EGL/HGL Vizualizator -->
<div id="widget-bernoulli-energy">
    <style>
        #widget-bernoulli-energy * { box-sizing: border-box; }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-shell {
            margin: 20px auto;
            max-width: 1120px;
            border: 1px solid #dce8f4;
            border-radius: 28px;
            overflow: hidden;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #ffffff 0%, #f7fbff 100%);
            box-shadow: 0 24px 58px rgba(41, 76, 109, 0.10);
            font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif;
            color: #17324d;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-head {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
            gap: 1rem;
            align-items: start;
            padding: 1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(14, 165, 233, 0.14), transparent 34%), linear-gradient(135deg, #eef8ff 0%, #ffffff 56%, #f4fbff 100%);
            border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(43, 92, 124, 0.10);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-kicker {
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.74rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #5d7b94;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-title {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: clamp(1.38rem, 2.4vw, 1.92rem);
            line-height: 1.08;
            color: #163c61;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-sub {
            margin: 0.55rem 0 0;
            max-width: 74ch;
            color: #547088;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-chip {
            align-self: start;
            padding: 0.76rem 0.96rem;
            border-radius: 999px;
            border: 1px solid #cfe3f7;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0f8ff, #fbfdff);
            color: #1d4f78;
            font-weight: 800;
            font-size: 0.82rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-note {
            margin: 1rem 1.55rem 0;
            padding: 0.95rem 1rem;
            border-radius: 16px;
            border: 1px solid #d7e8f8;
            background: linear-gradient(135deg, #eff7ff, #f8fbff);
            color: #2d587f;
            font-size: 0.86rem;
            line-height: 1.6;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-stage {
            margin: 1rem 1.55rem 0;
            border-radius: 22px;
            overflow: hidden;
            border: 1px solid #dbe6f0;
            background: radial-gradient(circle at top, #ffffff 0%, #eef6ff 68%, #e7f2fb 100%);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-stage canvas {
            display: block;
            width: 100%;
            height: auto;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-summary {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(6, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.75rem;
            padding: 1rem 1.55rem 0;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-stat {
            padding: 0.95rem;
            border-radius: 16px;
            background: linear-gradient(180deg, #fbfdff 0%, #eef7ff 100%);
            border: 1px solid rgba(31, 91, 150, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-stat small {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.7rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            letter-spacing: 0.07em;
            color: #6a849a;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-stat strong {
            display: block;
            font-size: 1.02rem;
            color: #123a63;
            font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-lower {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.9rem;
            padding: 1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-card {
            border: 1px solid #e3ebf2;
            border-radius: 18px;
            background: #ffffff;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-controls,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-bars,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-formula,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-legend,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-explainer {
            padding: 1rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-controls {
            display: grid;
            gap: 0.8rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-presets {
            display: grid;
            grid-template-columns: repeat(3, minmax(0, 1fr));
            gap: 0.5rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-preset {
            appearance: none;
            border: 1px solid #cfe3f7;
            border-radius: 999px;
            padding: 0.65rem 0.7rem;
            background: #eff7ff;
            color: #1d4f78;
            font-size: 0.78rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            cursor: pointer;
            transition: transform 0.16s ease, box-shadow 0.16s ease;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-preset:hover {
            transform: translateY(-1px);
            box-shadow: 0 10px 18px rgba(41, 76, 109, 0.08);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-row label {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.83rem;
            font-weight: 700;
            color: #36506b;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-row input {
            width: 100%;
            accent-color: #2f80ed;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy strong.section {
            display: block;
            margin-bottom: 0.55rem;
            font-size: 0.76rem;
            font-weight: 800;
            letter-spacing: 0.08em;
            text-transform: uppercase;
            color: #66829a;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-bar-row {
            display: flex;
            justify-content: space-between;
            gap: 1rem;
            margin-bottom: 0.35rem;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            color: #36506b;
            font-weight: 700;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-track {
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: #edf3f9;
            overflow: hidden;
            margin-bottom: 0.85rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-fill {
            height: 100%;
            width: 0;
            border-radius: inherit;
            transition: width 0.28s ease;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-vh1 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #60a5fa, #2563eb);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-vh2 {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f59e0b, #ef4444);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-formula {
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
            color: #355771;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-formula div + div {
            margin-top: 0.45rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-legend-grid {
            display: grid;
            gap: 0.6rem;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-legend-row {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 0.7rem;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            color: #355771;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-line,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-hgl,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-fill,
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-bar {
            flex: 0 0 auto;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-line {
            width: 22px;
            height: 0;
            border-top: 3px solid #ef4444;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-hgl {
            width: 22px;
            height: 0;
            border-top: 3px dashed #2563eb;
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-fill {
            width: 22px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 999px;
            background: rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.22);
            border: 1px solid rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.34);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-swatch-bar {
            width: 22px;
            height: 12px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            background: rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18);
            border: 1px solid rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28);
        }
        #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-explainer {
            grid-column: 1 / -1;
            border-color: #bfdbfe;
            background: #eff6ff;
            color: #1e3a8a;
            font-size: 0.84rem;
            line-height: 1.58;
        }
        @media (max-width: 980px) {
            #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-head,
            #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-summary,
            #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-lower {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
            #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-chip {
                justify-self: start;
            }
        }
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
            #widget-bernoulli-energy .be-presets {
                grid-template-columns: 1fr;
            }
        }
    </style>

    <div class="be-shell">
        <div class="be-head">
            <div>
                <div class="be-kicker">EGL i HGL u suženju cijevi</div>
                <h3 class="be-title">U suženju se ukupna energija ne mijenja, ali se njezin udio premješta iz statičkog tlaka u brzinsku visinu</h3>
                <p class="be-sub">Na presjeku 1 i presjeku 2 ukupna energija ostaje ista, pa je <strong>EGL</strong> vodoravna. Razlika je u tome što manji presjek tjera fluid na veću brzinu, pa se dio energije prebacuje u <strong>v²/2g</strong>, a <strong>HGL = z + p/ρg</strong> mora pasti.</p>
            </div>
            <div class="be-chip">EGL = HGL + v²/2g</div>
        </div>

        <div class="be-note"><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> najprije pogledaj crvenu liniju <strong>EGL</strong> koja ostaje stalna. Zatim usporedi plavu liniju <strong>HGL</strong> prije i poslije suženja. Obojeno područje između njih predstavlja brzinsku visinu, a dva stupca uz presjeke 1 i 2 pokazuju kako se ista ukupna energija drugačije raspodjeljuje.</div>

        <div class="be-stage">
            <canvas id="canvas-egl" width="920" height="420"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div class="be-summary">
            <div class="be-stat"><small>v1</small><strong id="v1-egl">1.50 m/s</strong></div>
            <div class="be-stat"><small>v2</small><strong id="v2-egl">2.00 m/s</strong></div>
            <div class="be-stat"><small>v1²/2g</small><strong id="vh1-egl">0.11 m</strong></div>
            <div class="be-stat"><small>v2²/2g</small><strong id="vh2-egl">0.20 m</strong></div>
            <div class="be-stat"><small>HGL1</small><strong id="hgl1-egl">7.39 m</strong></div>
            <div class="be-stat"><small>HGL2</small><strong id="hgl2-egl">7.30 m</strong></div>
        </div>

        <div class="be-lower">
            <div class="be-card be-controls">
                <div class="be-presets">
                    <button type="button" class="be-preset" id="egl-preset-wide">Blago suženje</button>
                    <button type="button" class="be-preset" id="egl-preset-mid">Srednje suženje</button>
                    <button type="button" class="be-preset" id="egl-preset-tight">Jako suženje</button>
                </div>

                <div class="be-row">
                    <label for="d2-slider-egl"><span>Promjer suženja D2</span><span id="d2-val-egl">90 mm</span></label>
                    <input type="range" id="d2-slider-egl" min="60" max="135" value="90" step="5">
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="be-card be-bars">
                <strong class="section">Koliki dio EGL-a otpada na brzinu?</strong>
                <div class="be-bar-row"><span>Presjek 1: v1²/2g</span><strong id="vh1-share-egl">1.5 %</strong></div>
                <div class="be-track"><div id="vh1-bar-egl" class="be-fill be-vh1"></div></div>
                <div class="be-bar-row"><span>Presjek 2: v2²/2g</span><strong id="vh2-share-egl">8.0 %</strong></div>
                <div class="be-track"><div id="vh2-bar-egl" class="be-fill be-vh2"></div></div>
            </div>

            <div class="be-card be-formula">
                <strong class="section">Računski lanac</strong>
                <div id="egl-eq1">A1 v1 = A2 v2</div>
                <div id="egl-eq2">v2 = v1 A1 / A2</div>
                <div id="egl-eq3">HGL2 = EGL - v2²/2g</div>
            </div>

            <div class="be-card be-legend">
                <strong class="section">Legenda i očitanje</strong>
                <div class="be-legend-grid">
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span class="be-swatch-line"></span><span>EGL: ukupna energija ostaje konstantna</span></div>
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span class="be-swatch-hgl"></span><span>HGL: statička plus geodetska komponenta</span></div>
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span class="be-swatch-fill"></span><span>Brzinska visina v²/2g</span></div>
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span class="be-swatch-bar"></span><span>Energetski stupci u presjeku 1 i 2</span></div>
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span>D2/A1</span><strong id="area-ratio-egl">36 %</strong></div>
                    <div class="be-legend-row"><span>Pad HGL-a</span><strong id="drop-egl">2.00 m</strong></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class="be-card be-explainer">
                <strong class="section">Što se sada događa</strong>
                <div id="egl-explainer">Kad se cijev suzi, brzina raste pa se brzinska visina povećava. Budući da je EGL stalna, HGL mora pasti upravo za isti iznos.</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
    (function() {
        const root = document.getElementById('widget-bernoulli-energy');
        if (!root) return;

        const canvas = root.querySelector('#canvas-egl');
        const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
        const input = root.querySelector('#d2-slider-egl');
        const out = {
            d2: root.querySelector('#d2-val-egl'),
            v1: root.querySelector('#v1-egl'),
            v2: root.querySelector('#v2-egl'),
            vh1: root.querySelector('#vh1-egl'),
            vh2: root.querySelector('#vh2-egl'),
            hgl1: root.querySelector('#hgl1-egl'),
            hgl2: root.querySelector('#hgl2-egl'),
            areaRatio: root.querySelector('#area-ratio-egl'),
            drop: root.querySelector('#drop-egl'),
            vh1Bar: root.querySelector('#vh1-bar-egl'),
            vh2Bar: root.querySelector('#vh2-bar-egl'),
            vh1Share: root.querySelector('#vh1-share-egl'),
            vh2Share: root.querySelector('#vh2-share-egl'),
            eq1: root.querySelector('#egl-eq1'),
            eq2: root.querySelector('#egl-eq2'),
            eq3: root.querySelector('#egl-eq3'),
            explainer: root.querySelector('#egl-explainer')
        };

        const d1 = 150;
        const v1 = 1.5;
        const g = 9.81;
        const totalHead = 7.5;
        const particles = Array.from({ length: 84 }, function() {
            return { t: Math.random(), yRel: Math.random() };
        });
        let latest = null;

        function fmt(value, digits) {
            return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
        }

        function area(diameterMm) {
            return Math.PI * diameterMm * diameterMm / 4 / 1000000;
        }

        function smoothStep(value) {
            return value * value * (3 - 2 * value);
        }

        function localDiameterMm(x, d2) {
            const start = 310;
            const end = 540;
            if (x <= start) return d1;
            if (x >= end) return d2;
            const t = (x - start) / (end - start);
            return d1 + (d2 - d1) * smoothStep(t);
        }

        function velocityFromDiameter(diameterMm) {
            return v1 * (d1 * d1) / (diameterMm * diameterMm);
        }

        function compute() {
            const d2 = parseFloat(input.value);
            const a1 = area(d1);
            const a2 = area(d2);
            const v2 = velocityFromDiameter(d2);
            const vHead1 = (v1 * v1) / (2 * g);
            const vHead2 = (v2 * v2) / (2 * g);
            const hgl1 = totalHead - vHead1;
            const hgl2 = totalHead - vHead2;
            const areaRatio = a2 / a1;
            const hglDrop = hgl1 - hgl2;
            const velocityShare1 = vHead1 / totalHead;
            const velocityShare2 = vHead2 / totalHead;
            return { d2, a1, a2, v2, vHead1, vHead2, hgl1, hgl2, areaRatio, hglDrop, velocityShare1, velocityShare2 };
        }

        function syncText(data) {
            out.d2.textContent = fmt(data.d2, 0) + ' mm';
            out.v1.textContent = fmt(v1, 2) + ' m/s';
            out.v2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
            out.vh1.textContent = fmt(data.vHead1, 2) + ' m';
            out.vh2.textContent = fmt(data.vHead2, 2) + ' m';
            out.hgl1.textContent = fmt(data.hgl1, 2) + ' m';
            out.hgl2.textContent = fmt(data.hgl2, 2) + ' m';
            out.areaRatio.textContent = (data.areaRatio * 100).toFixed(0) + ' %';
            out.drop.textContent = fmt(data.hglDrop, 2) + ' m';

            out.vh1Bar.style.width = Math.min(data.velocityShare1 * 100, 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
            out.vh2Bar.style.width = Math.min(data.velocityShare2 * 100, 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
            out.vh1Share.textContent = (data.velocityShare1 * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
            out.vh2Share.textContent = (data.velocityShare2 * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

            out.eq1.textContent = 'A1 = ' + fmt(data.a1, 4) + ' m^2, A2 = ' + fmt(data.a2, 4) + ' m^2';
            out.eq2.textContent = 'v2 = ' + fmt(v1, 2) + ' · ' + fmt(data.a1, 4) + ' / ' + fmt(data.a2, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
            out.eq3.textContent = 'HGL2 = ' + fmt(totalHead, 2) + ' - ' + fmt(data.vHead2, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.hgl2, 2) + ' m';

            if (data.areaRatio > 0.65) {
                out.explainer.textContent = 'Suženje je još blago, pa se brzina u presjeku 2 povećava umjereno. Zato HGL pada samo malo: statički tlak je i dalje dominantan dio ukupne energije.';
            } else if (data.areaRatio > 0.35) {
                out.explainer.textContent = 'Srednje suženje jasno pokazuje Bernoullijevu zamjenu energije: dio HGL-a prelazi u brzinsku visinu, pa se plava linija u užem dijelu osjetno spušta iako crvena EGL ostaje ista.';
            } else {
                out.explainer.textContent = 'Jako suženje snažno ubrzava tok. Brzinska visina u presjeku 2 postaje velik dio ukupne energije, pa HGL mora znatno pasti da bi EGL ostala konstantna.';
            }
        }

        function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
            const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
            const head = 10;
            ctx.strokeStyle = color;
            ctx.fillStyle = color;
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x1 + 6, y1 - 8);
        }

        function drawEnergyColumn(x, yDatum, yHgl, yEgl, labelHgl, labelV) {
            const width = 24;

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.18)';
            ctx.fillRect(x - width / 2, yHgl, width, yDatum - yHgl);
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.28)';
            ctx.strokeRect(x - width / 2, yHgl, width, yDatum - yHgl);

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.20)';
            ctx.fillRect(x - width / 2, yEgl, width, yHgl - yEgl);
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.34)';
            ctx.strokeRect(x - width / 2, yEgl, width, yHgl - yEgl);

            ctx.fillStyle = '#1e3a8a';
            ctx.font = 'bold 11px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(labelHgl, x - 32, yDatum + 18);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#c2410c';
            ctx.fillText(labelV, x - 24, yEgl - 10);
        }

        function drawScene(data) {
            ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
            bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
            bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
            ctx.fillStyle = bg;
            ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

            const cy = 288;
            const yDatum = 350;
            const headScale = 28;
            const eglY = yDatum - totalHead * headScale;
            const hgl1Y = yDatum - data.hgl1 * headScale;
            const hgl2Y = yDatum - data.hgl2 * headScale;

            const x0 = 72;
            const x1 = 310;
            const x2 = 540;
            const x3 = 850;
            const sec1 = 200;
            const sec2 = 690;
            const d1Px = d1 * 0.72;
            const d2Px = data.d2 * 0.72;

            ctx.fillStyle = '#eef4fa';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x0, cy - d1Px / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(x1, cy - d1Px / 2);
            ctx.bezierCurveTo(x1 + 70, cy - d1Px / 2, x2 - 50, cy - d2Px / 2, x2, cy - d2Px / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(x3, cy - d2Px / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(x3, cy + d2Px / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(x2, cy + d2Px / 2);
            ctx.bezierCurveTo(x2 - 50, cy + d2Px / 2, x1 + 70, cy + d1Px / 2, x1, cy + d1Px / 2);
            ctx.lineTo(x0, cy + d1Px / 2);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(249, 115, 22, 0.12)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x0, eglY);
            for (let x = x0; x <= x3; x += 6) {
                const localD = localDiameterMm(x, data.d2);
                const localV = velocityFromDiameter(localD);
                const localHead = (localV * localV) / (2 * g);
                const localHglY = yDatum - (totalHead - localHead) * headScale;
                ctx.lineTo(x, localHglY);
            }
            ctx.lineTo(x3, eglY);
            ctx.closePath();
            ctx.fill();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            ctx.moveTo(x0, eglY);
            ctx.lineTo(x3, eglY);
            ctx.stroke();

            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
            ctx.lineWidth = 3;
            for (let x = x0; x <= x3; x += 6) {
                const localD = localDiameterMm(x, data.d2);
                const localV = velocityFromDiameter(localD);
                const localHead = (localV * localV) / (2 * g);
                const localHglY = yDatum - (totalHead - localHead) * headScale;
                if (x === x0) ctx.moveTo(x, localHglY);
                else ctx.lineTo(x, localHglY);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            particles.forEach(function(particle) {
                const currentX = x0 + particle.t * (x3 - x0);
                const localDiameterPx = localDiameterMm(currentX, data.d2) * 0.72;
                const localVelocity = velocityFromDiameter(localDiameterMm(currentX, data.d2));
                particle.t += 0.0017 + (localVelocity / 10) * 0.0025;
                if (particle.t > 1) particle.t = 0;

                const px = x0 + particle.t * (x3 - x0);
                const currentDiameterPx = localDiameterMm(px, data.d2) * 0.72;
                const py = cy + (particle.yRel - 0.5) * currentDiameterPx * 0.72;
                ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, 2.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            });

            ctx.setLineDash([6, 4]);
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(100, 116, 139, 0.75)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1.5;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(sec1, 64);
            ctx.lineTo(sec1, 374);
            ctx.moveTo(sec2, 64);
            ctx.lineTo(sec2, 374);
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.setLineDash([]);

            drawEnergyColumn(sec1, yDatum, hgl1Y, eglY, 'HGL1', 'v1²/2g');
            drawEnergyColumn(sec2, yDatum, hgl2Y, eglY, 'HGL2', 'v2²/2g');

            drawArrow(120, cy, 185, cy, '#0ea5e9', 'v1');
            drawArrow(608, cy, 720, cy, '#f97316', 'v2');

            ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText('presjek 1', sec1 - 28, 58);
            ctx.fillText('presjek 2', sec2 - 28, 58);
            ctx.fillText('EGL = const', 760, eglY - 10);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#1d4ed8';
            ctx.fillText('HGL pada kad se tok ubrza', 600, hgl2Y - 12);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#355771';
            ctx.fillText('D2 manji -> v2 veći -> HGL niži', 540, cy + d2Px / 2 + 34);
        }

        function update() {
            latest = compute();
            syncText(latest);
        }

        function loop() {
            if (latest) drawScene(latest);
            requestAnimationFrame(loop);
        }

        input.addEventListener('input', update);
        input.addEventListener('change', update);

        root.querySelector('#egl-preset-wide').addEventListener('click', function() {
            input.value = '125';
            update();
        });
        root.querySelector('#egl-preset-mid').addEventListener('click', function() {
            input.value = '90';
            update();
        });
        root.querySelector('#egl-preset-tight').addEventListener('click', function() {
            input.value = '60';
            update();
        });

        update();
        loop();
    })();
    </script>
</div>
```

***

### Zadatak Z76 â€” Domet slobodnog mlaza {.unnumbered}

 
76. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da je spremnik na slici velikih dimenzija, pri čemu su gubici strujanja zanemarivi, potrebno je odrediti izraz za udaljenost x od izlaza iz spremnika, gdje će slobodni mlaz tekućine doći u dodir sa horizontalom tla, u funkciji ovisnosti o h i H.


**Zadano:** $h, H$  
**Odrediti:** $x$ za $h/H = 0,25$, $0,50$ i $0,75$

**Pretpostavke:** Spremnik velikih dimenzija, gubici uslijed strujanja se zanemaruju.

**Rješenje:**
1. **Brzina istjecanja:** $v_0 = \sqrt{2g(H-h)}$.
2. **Domet:** $x = v_0 \cdot \sqrt{\frac{2h}{g}} = \mathbf{2\sqrt{h(H-h)}}$.
3. **Maksimum:** Domet je maksimalan kada je $h = H/2$, tada je $x = H$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Torricellijev zakon i domet mlaza -->
<div id="z76-jet-legacy" style="display:none;max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🎯 Torricellijev zakon i domet mlaza</h4>

    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati widget:</strong> Najprije iz visinske razlike <strong>H - h</strong> dobivaš izlaznu brzinu <strong>v₀</strong>, zatim iz visine otvora <strong>h</strong> dobivaš vrijeme pada <strong>t</strong>, a tek njihov umnožak daje domet <strong>x</strong>. Tako odmah vidiš zašto je maksimum kod <strong>h/H = 0,5</strong>.
    </div>
    
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="z76-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>

        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Visina otvora h: <span id="z76-v-h" style="color:#2563eb;">2.5</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z76-h-slider" min="0.5" max="4.5" step="0.1" value="2.5" style="width: 100%; accent-color: #3b82f6;">
                
                <div style="margin-top: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px;">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="z76-show-all" checked>
                    <label for="z76-show-all" style="font-size: 0.85rem; font-weight: 600; color: #475569;">Prikaži sve putanje (0.25H, 0.5H, 0.75H)</label>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Brzina v₀</div>
                    <div id="z76-res-v0" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Vrijeme leta t</div>
                    <div id="z76-res-t" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Omjer h/H</div>
                    <div id="z76-res-ratio" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.50</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="background: #f0fdf4; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #22c55e;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #166534; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Rezultat:</div>
                <div style="font-size: 1.1rem; color: #166534;">
                    Domet mlaza x: <b id="z76-res-x">5.00 m</b>
                </div>
                <div id="z76-res-note" style="font-size: 0.8rem; color: #15803d; margin-top: 8px; line-height: 1.4;">
                    Maksimalni domet postiže se pri <b>h = H/2 = 2.5m</b>.
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z76-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z76-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const hS = document.getElementById('z76-h-slider');
    const allC = document.getElementById('z76-show-all');

    function update() {
        const h = parseFloat(hS.value);
        const H = 5.0;
        const g = 9.81;
        const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * g * (H - h));
        const tFlight = Math.sqrt((2 * h) / g);
        const x = v0 * tFlight;
        const ratio = h / H;
        const nearMax = Math.abs(h - H / 2) < 0.2;
        
        document.getElementById('z76-v-h').innerText = h.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z76-res-v0').innerText = v0.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z76-res-t').innerText = tFlight.toFixed(2) + " s";
        document.getElementById('z76-res-ratio').innerText = ratio.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z76-res-x').innerText = x.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z76-res-note').innerHTML = nearMax
            ? "Otvor je vrlo blizu položaja <b>h = H/2</b>, pa je domet gotovo maksimalan."
            : "Maksimalni domet postiže se pri <b>h = H/2 = 2.5 m</b>, kada su doprinos brzine i vremena leta najbolje uravnoteženi.";
        document.getElementById('z76-explainer').textContent = `Za h = ${h.toFixed(1)} m preostala visina iznad otvora je ${(H - h).toFixed(1)} m, pa mlaz izlazi brzinom ${v0.toFixed(2)} m/s. Budući da potom pada ${h.toFixed(1)} m, u zraku provede ${tFlight.toFixed(2)} s i zato dosegne domet ${x.toFixed(2)} m.`;
        
        draw(h, H, allC.checked);
    }

    function draw(currentH, H, showAll) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, 550, 400);
        const scale = 60;
        const x0 = 80, y0 = 350;
        
        // Ground
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(20, y0); ctx.lineTo(530, y0); ctx.stroke();

        // Tank
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.1)";
        ctx.fillRect(x0 - 60, y0 - H*scale, 60, H*scale);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(x0 - 60, y0 - H*scale, 60, H*scale);
        
        // Water level
        ctx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.4)";
        ctx.fillRect(x0 - 60, y0 - H*scale, 60, H*scale);

        const drawJet = (h, color, alpha) => {
            ctx.strokeStyle = color; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(x0, y0 - h*scale);
            const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * 9.81 * (H-h));
            for(let t = 0; t < 2; t += 0.02) {
                let px = v0 * t;
                let py = 0.5 * 9.81 * t*t;
                if(py > h) break;
                ctx.lineTo(x0 + px*scale, y0 - h*scale + py*scale);
            }
            ctx.stroke();
            ctx.globalAlpha = 1.0;
        };

        if(showAll) {
            drawJet(H*0.25, "#f59e0b", 0.4);
            drawJet(H*0.50, "#ef4444", 0.4);
            drawJet(H*0.75, "#8b5cf6", 0.4);
        }
        
        drawJet(currentH, "#3b82f6", 1.0);

        // Labels
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.font = "bold 12px Inter";
        ctx.fillText("H = 5m", x0 - 55, y0 - H*scale - 10);
    }

    hS.oninput = update;
    allC.onchange = update;
    update();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='z76-jet-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
    <style>
        #z76-jet-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(250,204,21,.16),transparent 32%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-stage{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-stage canvas{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;padding:0;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-overlay div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;padding:.85rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-overlay span{font-weight:800;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-state{position:static;align-self:flex-start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.08);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-state.max{color:#166534;border-color:#86efac;background:rgba(240,253,244,.95)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-state.low{color:#92400e;border-color:#fdba74;background:rgba(255,247,237,.95)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-state.high{color:#1d4ed8;border-color:#93c5fd;background:rgba(239,246,255,.95)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-check{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.65rem;padding:.75rem .85rem;border-radius:14px;background:#f8fbff;border:1px solid #e0ebf5;color:#355771;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-check input{accent-color:#2563eb;inline-size:16px;block-size:16px}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-bars,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-formula,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-explainer{padding:1rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-bars strong.section,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-formula strong.section,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-speed{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#2563eb)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-fall{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#f97316)}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
        #z76-jet-scene .z76b-explainer{grid-column:1/-1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
        @media (max-width:980px){
            #z76-jet-scene .z76b-head,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z76-jet-scene .z76b-chip{justify-self:start}
        }
        @media (max-width:640px){
            #z76-jet-scene .z76b-presets,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-metrics,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-overlay,#z76-jet-scene .z76b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z76-jet-scene .z76b-stage{padding:.85rem}
        }
    </style>
    <div class='z76b-shell'>
        <div class='z76b-head'>
            <div>
                <div class='z76b-kicker'>Z76 domet slobodnog mlaza</div>
                <h3 class='z76b-title'>Domet nije najveći ni kad je otvor prenisko ni kad je previsoko, nego kada se brzina istjecanja i vrijeme leta međusobno uravnoteže</h3>
                <p class='z76b-sub'>Iz razlike razina <strong>H - h</strong> dobivaš izlaznu brzinu <strong>v<sub>0</sub></strong>, iz same visine otvora <strong>h</strong> dobivaš vrijeme leta <strong>t</strong>, a tek zatim njihov umnožak daje domet <strong>x</strong>. Zato je maksimum baš oko <strong>h/H = 0.5</strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class='z76b-chip'>x = 2sqrt(h(H - h))</div>
        </div>

        <div class='z76b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> u spremniku pratiš ukupnu razinu <strong>H</strong> i visinu otvora <strong>h</strong>, a u mlazu desno vidiš kako se ta dva geometrijska podatka pretvaraju u brzinu, vrijeme leta i konačni domet. Referentne putanje za <strong>0.25H</strong>, <strong>0.50H</strong> i <strong>0.75H</strong> služe samo kao vizualna usporedba.</div>

        <div class='z76b-grid'>
            <div class='z76b-stage'>
                <canvas id='z76b-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
                <div class='z76b-overlay'>
                    <div><strong>v<sub>0</sub></strong><span id='z76b-ov-v0'>4.95 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>t</strong><span id='z76b-ov-t'>0.71 s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>x</strong><span id='z76b-ov-x'>3.54 m</span></div>
                </div>
                <div id='z76b-state' class='z76b-state max'>Blizu maksimuma</div>
            </div>

            <div class='z76b-side'>
                <div class='z76b-card z76b-controls'>
                    <div class='z76b-presets'>
                        <button type='button' class='z76b-preset' id='z76b-preset-low'>0.25H</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z76b-preset' id='z76b-preset-mid'>0.50H</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z76b-preset' id='z76b-preset-high'>0.75H</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class='z76b-row'><label for='z76b-h'><span>Visina otvora h</span><span id='z76b-h-label'>2.5 m</span></label><input id='z76b-h' type='range' min='0.5' max='4.5' step='0.1' value='2.5'></div>
                    <label class='z76b-check'><input id='z76b-showrefs' type='checkbox' checked><span>Prikaži referentne putanje za 0.25H, 0.50H i 0.75H</span></label>
                </div>

                <div class='z76b-card z76b-metrics'>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>h</small><strong id='z76b-h-out'>2.50 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>H - h</small><strong id='z76b-dh-out'>2.50 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>v0</small><strong id='z76b-v0-out'>4.95 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>t</small><strong id='z76b-t-out'>0.71 s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>x</small><strong id='z76b-x-out'>5.00 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-metric'><small>Omjer h/H</small><strong id='z76b-ratio-out'>0.50</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z76b-card z76b-bars'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što hrani domet?</strong>
                    <div class='z76b-bar-row'><span>Visinska razlika H - h daje v0</span><strong id='z76b-speed-label'>50.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-track'><div id='z76b-speed-bar' class='z76b-fill z76b-speed'></div></div>
                    <div class='z76b-bar-row'><span>Visina pada h daje t</span><strong id='z76b-fall-label'>50.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z76b-track'><div id='z76b-fall-bar' class='z76b-fill z76b-fall'></div></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z76b-card z76b-formula'>
                    <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
                    <div id='z76b-eq1'>v0 = sqrt(2g(H - h))</div>
                    <div id='z76b-eq2'>t = sqrt(2h/g)</div>
                    <div id='z76b-eq3'>x = v0 t</div>
                </div>

                <div class='z76b-card z76b-explainer'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
                    <div id='z76b-expl'>Kad su h i H - h približno izbalansirani, dobiješ dobar kompromis između velike brzine i dugog vremena leta, pa domet raste prema maksimumu.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const root = document.getElementById('z76-jet-scene');
    if (!root) return;

    const canvas = root.querySelector('#z76b-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const H = 5.0;
    const g = 9.81;
    const inputs = {
        h: root.querySelector('#z76b-h'),
        refs: root.querySelector('#z76b-showrefs')
    };
    const labels = {
        h: root.querySelector('#z76b-h-label')
    };
    const out = {
        ovV0: root.querySelector('#z76b-ov-v0'),
        ovT: root.querySelector('#z76b-ov-t'),
        ovX: root.querySelector('#z76b-ov-x'),
        state: root.querySelector('#z76b-state'),
        h: root.querySelector('#z76b-h-out'),
        dh: root.querySelector('#z76b-dh-out'),
        v0: root.querySelector('#z76b-v0-out'),
        t: root.querySelector('#z76b-t-out'),
        x: root.querySelector('#z76b-x-out'),
        ratio: root.querySelector('#z76b-ratio-out'),
        speedBar: root.querySelector('#z76b-speed-bar'),
        fallBar: root.querySelector('#z76b-fall-bar'),
        speedLabel: root.querySelector('#z76b-speed-label'),
        fallLabel: root.querySelector('#z76b-fall-label'),
        eq1: root.querySelector('#z76b-eq1'),
        eq2: root.querySelector('#z76b-eq2'),
        eq3: root.querySelector('#z76b-eq3'),
        expl: root.querySelector('#z76b-expl')
    };

    let latest = null;
    let phase = 0;

    function fmt(value, digits) {
        return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
    }

    function compute() {
        const h = parseFloat(inputs.h.value);
        const deltaH = H - h;
        const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * g * deltaH);
        const tFlight = Math.sqrt((2 * h) / g);
        const x = v0 * tFlight;
        const ratio = h / H;
        return { h, deltaH, v0, tFlight, x, ratio, showRefs: inputs.refs.checked };
    }

    function syncText(data) {
        labels.h.textContent = fmt(data.h, 1) + ' m';

        out.ovV0.textContent = fmt(data.v0, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.ovT.textContent = fmt(data.tFlight, 2) + ' s';
        out.ovX.textContent = fmt(data.x, 2) + ' m';
        out.h.textContent = fmt(data.h, 2) + ' m';
        out.dh.textContent = fmt(data.deltaH, 2) + ' m';
        out.v0.textContent = fmt(data.v0, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.t.textContent = fmt(data.tFlight, 2) + ' s';
        out.x.textContent = fmt(data.x, 2) + ' m';
        out.ratio.textContent = fmt(data.ratio, 2);

        out.speedBar.style.width = (data.deltaH / H * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.fallBar.style.width = (data.ratio * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.speedLabel.textContent = (data.deltaH / H * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
        out.fallLabel.textContent = (data.ratio * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

        out.eq1.textContent = 'v0 = sqrt(2 · 9.81 · ' + fmt(data.deltaH, 2) + ') = ' + fmt(data.v0, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.eq2.textContent = 't = sqrt(2 · ' + fmt(data.h, 2) + ' / 9.81) = ' + fmt(data.tFlight, 2) + ' s';
        out.eq3.textContent = 'x = ' + fmt(data.v0, 2) + ' · ' + fmt(data.tFlight, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.x, 2) + ' m';

        if (Math.abs(data.h - H / 2) < 0.18) {
            out.state.className = 'z76b-state max';
            out.state.textContent = 'Blizu maksimuma';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Otvor je vrlo blizu položaja h = H/2, pa su brzina istjecanja i vrijeme leta najbolje izbalansirani. Zato je domet gotovo maksimalan i približava se vrijednosti H = 5 m.';
        } else if (data.h < H / 2) {
            out.state.className = 'z76b-state low';
            out.state.textContent = 'Niži otvor';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Otvor je niže u stijenci spremnika, pa mlaz ima duže vrijeme leta, ali manju raspoloživu visinsku razliku H - h za stvaranje brzine. Domet raste dok se ta dva učinka ne izbalansiraju.';
        } else {
            out.state.className = 'z76b-state high';
            out.state.textContent = 'Viši otvor';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Otvor je više postavljen, pa je izlazna brzina velika jer je H - h veći, ali mlaz ima manje vremena za let. Zato domet nakon prolaska optimuma ponovno pada iako je istjecanje brže.';
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, label) {
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const head = 10;
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x1 + 6, (y1 + y2) / 2 - 4);
        }
    }

    function drawJet(h, color, alpha, scale, xStart, groundY) {
        const v0 = Math.sqrt(2 * g * (H - h));
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.globalAlpha = alpha;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(xStart, groundY - h * scale);
        for (let t = 0; t <= 2; t += 0.02) {
            const px = v0 * t;
            const py = 0.5 * g * t * t;
            if (py > h) break;
            ctx.lineTo(xStart + px * scale, groundY - h * scale + py * scale);
        }
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.globalAlpha = 1;
    }

    function drawScene(data) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const groundY = 438;
        const scale = 62;
        const tankX = 118;
        const xStart = tankX + 8;
        const tankW = 92;
        const xToPx = 58;

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#94a3b8';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(24, groundY);
        ctx.lineTo(690, groundY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,.12)';
        ctx.fillRect(tankX - tankW, groundY - H * scale, tankW, H * scale);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,.28)';
        ctx.fillRect(tankX - tankW + 6, groundY - H * scale + 6, tankW - 12, H * scale - 6);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#334155';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(tankX - tankW, groundY - H * scale, tankW, H * scale);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('spremnik', tankX - tankW + 12, groundY - H * scale - 14);
        ctx.fillText('tlo', 650, groundY - 10);

        if (data.showRefs) {
            drawJet(H * 0.25, '#f59e0b', 0.32, xToPx, xStart, groundY);
            drawJet(H * 0.50, '#ef4444', 0.32, xToPx, xStart, groundY);
            drawJet(H * 0.75, '#8b5cf6', 0.32, xToPx, xStart, groundY);
        }
        drawJet(data.h, '#2563eb', 1, xToPx, xStart, groundY);

        const dropletTime = (phase % 1) * data.tFlight;
        const dropletX = xStart + data.v0 * dropletTime * xToPx;
        const dropletY = groundY - data.h * scale + 0.5 * g * dropletTime * dropletTime * scale;
        ctx.fillStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(dropletX, dropletY, 6, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        drawArrow(tankX - tankW - 20, groundY - H * scale, tankX - tankW - 20, groundY, '#0f766e', 'H');
        drawArrow(tankX + 34, groundY - data.h * scale, tankX + 34, groundY, '#f97316', 'h');
        drawArrow(tankX - 8, groundY - H * scale, tankX - 8, groundY - data.h * scale, '#2563eb', 'H - h');

        ctx.setLineDash([6, 4]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#2563eb';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(xStart + data.x * xToPx, groundY - 10);
        ctx.lineTo(xStart + data.x * xToPx, groundY + 10);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('x = ' + fmt(data.x, 2) + ' m', xStart + data.x * xToPx - 24, groundY + 28);
    }

    function update() {
        latest = compute();
        syncText(latest);
    }

    function loop() {
        phase += 0.014;
        if (latest) drawScene(latest);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    inputs.h.addEventListener('input', update);
    inputs.h.addEventListener('change', update);
    inputs.refs.addEventListener('change', update);

    root.querySelector('#z76b-preset-low').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h.value = '1.25';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z76b-preset-mid').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h.value = '2.50';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z76b-preset-high').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h.value = '3.75';
        update();
    });

    update();
    loop();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z77 â€” Srednja brzina laminarnog toka {.unnumbered}

 
77. Ukoliko imamo laminaran tok unutar cijevi kružnog presjeka, profil brzine bit će parabola. Brzina istjecanja tada će predstavljati volumen paraboloida. Potrebno je dokazati da je za ovakav slučaj srednja brzina strujanja $v_{sr}$ jednaka polovini maksimalne brzine strujanja $v_{max}$.

**Dokaz:** $v_{sr} = \frac{1}{A} \int v dA = \frac{1}{R^2 \pi} \int_0^R v_{max}(1 - \frac{r^2}{R^2}) 2\pi r dr = \mathbf{\frac{v_{max}}{2}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Laminaran profil brzine (Paraboloid) -->
<div id="z77-laminar-legacy" style="display:none;max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">💧 Laminaran profil brzine u cijevi (Paraboloid)</h4>
    
    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati profil:</strong> U osi cijevi je brzina najveća, a prema stijenci pada na nulu. Pomoću radijalne sonde možeš odabrati bilo koji položaj <strong>r/R</strong> i odmah vidjeti lokalnu brzinu <strong>v(r)</strong>, pa onda usporediti taj profil sa srednjom brzinom <strong>v<sub>sr</sub> = v<sub>max</sub>/2</strong>.
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 30px;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 350px;">
            <canvas id="z77-side-canvas" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <b>Bočni presjek (2D)</b>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 350px;">
            <canvas id="z77-front-canvas" width="400" height="350" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div style="position: absolute; top: 10px; left: 10px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.8); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #cbd5e0;">
                <b>Poprečni presjek (Heatmap)</b>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 25px; background: #f1f5f9; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px;">
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Maksimalna brzina v_max: <span id="z77-v-vmax" style="color:#2563eb;">2.0</span> m/s</label>
            <input type="range" id="z77-vmax-slider" min="0.5" max="5" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Polumjer cijevi R: <span id="z77-v-r" style="color:#2563eb;">100</span> mm</label>
            <input type="range" id="z77-r-slider" min="50" max="150" step="5" value="100" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
        <div>
            <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #475569;">Radijalna sonda r/R: <span id="z77-v-probe" style="color:#2563eb;">0.50</span></label>
            <input type="range" id="z77-probe-slider" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.5" style="width: 100%;">
        </div>
    </div>

    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 20px; margin-top: 20px;">
        <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
            <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.7rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px;">Analiza protoka:</div>
            <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 5px; font-size: 0.9rem;">
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span>Srednja brzina v_sr:</span> <b id="z77-res-vsr" style="color:#2b6cb0;">1.00 m/s</b>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span>Volumenski protok V̇:</span> <b id="z77-res-vdot" style="color:#2b6cb0;">31.42 L/s</b>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span>Lokalna brzina v(r):</span> <b id="z77-res-vprobe" style="color:#2b6cb0;">1.50 m/s</b>
                </div>
                <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;">
                    <span>Položaj sonde r:</span> <b id="z77-res-rprobe" style="color:#2b6cb0;">50 mm</b>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="background: #fdf2f8; padding: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 6px solid #db2777; font-size: 0.8rem; color: #831843; line-height: 1.4;">
            <strong>Fizikalni uvid:</strong> <span id="z77-explainer">Kod laminarnog toka, trenje o stijenke uzrokuje nultu brzinu na rubu. Rezultirajući profil je paraboloid čija je srednja brzina točno polovica maksimalne brzine u osi cijevi.</span>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
(function() {
    const sCanvas = document.getElementById('z77-side-canvas');
    const sCtx = sCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const fCanvas = document.getElementById('z77-front-canvas');
    const fCtx = fCanvas.getContext('2d');
    const vmaxS = document.getElementById('z77-vmax-slider');
    const rS = document.getElementById('z77-r-slider');
    const probeS = document.getElementById('z77-probe-slider');

    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<80; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random() * 400, r_rel: (Math.random() * 2 - 1) });

    function update() {
        const vmax = parseFloat(vmaxS.value);
        const r_mm = parseFloat(rS.value);
        const probeRel = parseFloat(probeS.value);
        const vProbe = vmax * (1 - probeRel * probeRel);
        const rProbe = probeRel * r_mm;
        document.getElementById('z77-v-vmax').innerText = vmax.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z77-v-r').innerText = r_mm.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z77-v-probe').innerText = probeRel.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z77-res-vsr').innerText = (vmax/2).toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z77-res-vdot').innerText = (vmax/2 * Math.PI * Math.pow(r_mm/1000, 2) * 1000).toFixed(2) + " L/s";
        document.getElementById('z77-res-vprobe').innerText = vProbe.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z77-res-rprobe').innerText = rProbe.toFixed(0) + " mm";
        document.getElementById('z77-explainer').textContent = `Na položaju r/R = ${probeRel.toFixed(2)} lokalna brzina iznosi ${vProbe.toFixed(2)} m/s. Što se više približavaš stijenci, član (1 - r²/R²) pada prema nuli, pa profil ostaje paraboličan i ukupni presjek daje srednju brzinu ${ (vmax / 2).toFixed(2) } m/s.`;
        draw(vmax, r_mm, probeRel);
    }

    function draw(vmax, r_mm, probeRel) {
        const cy = 175, R_px = r_mm;
        const probeY = cy + probeRel * R_px;
        const probeVRel = 1 - probeRel * probeRel;
        sCtx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 350);
        sCtx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; sCtx.lineWidth = 3;
        sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(0, cy - R_px); sCtx.lineTo(400, cy - R_px); sCtx.stroke();
        sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(0, cy + R_px); sCtx.lineTo(400, cy + R_px); sCtx.stroke();
        sCtx.fillStyle = "rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.2)";
        sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.moveTo(50, cy - R_px);
        for(let y = -R_px; y <= R_px; y++) {
            const v_rel = 1 - Math.pow(y / R_px, 2);
            sCtx.lineTo(50 + v_rel * (vmax * 40), cy + y);
        }
        sCtx.lineTo(50, cy + R_px); sCtx.fill();
        particles.forEach(p => {
            p.x += (1 - Math.pow(p.r_rel, 2)) * vmax * 2;
            if(p.x > 400) p.x = 0;
            sCtx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; sCtx.beginPath(); sCtx.arc(p.x, cy + p.r_rel * R_px, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); sCtx.fill();
        });
        sCtx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444";
        sCtx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        sCtx.beginPath();
        sCtx.moveTo(40, probeY);
        sCtx.lineTo(50 + probeVRel * (vmax * 40), probeY);
        sCtx.stroke();
        sCtx.setLineDash([]);
        sCtx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        sCtx.beginPath();
        sCtx.arc(50 + probeVRel * (vmax * 40), probeY, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        sCtx.fill();
        sCtx.fillStyle = "#991b1b";
        sCtx.font = "bold 11px Inter";
        sCtx.fillText("v(r)", 58 + probeVRel * (vmax * 40), probeY - 8);
        fCtx.clearRect(0, 0, 400, 350);
        const fx = 200, fy = 175;
        for(let r = R_px; r > 0; r -= 2) {
            const v_rel = 1 - Math.pow(r / R_px, 2);
            const r_col = Math.floor(59 * v_rel + 255 * (1-v_rel));
            const g_col = Math.floor(130 * v_rel + 255 * (1-v_rel));
            fCtx.fillStyle = `rgb(${r_col}, ${g_col}, 255)`;
            fCtx.beginPath(); fCtx.arc(fx, fy, r, 0, Math.PI*2); fCtx.fill();
        }
        fCtx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; fCtx.lineWidth = 3;
        fCtx.beginPath(); fCtx.arc(fx, fy, R_px, 0, Math.PI*2); fCtx.stroke();
        fCtx.strokeStyle = "#ef4444";
        fCtx.setLineDash([6, 5]);
        fCtx.beginPath();
        fCtx.moveTo(fx, fy);
        fCtx.lineTo(fx + probeRel * R_px, fy);
        fCtx.stroke();
        fCtx.setLineDash([]);
        fCtx.fillStyle = "#ef4444";
        fCtx.beginPath();
        fCtx.arc(fx + probeRel * R_px, fy, 5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        fCtx.fill();
    }
    vmaxS.oninput = update; rS.oninput = update; probeS.oninput = update; update();
    function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); }
    anim();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='z77-laminar-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
    <style>
        #z77-laminar-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(56,189,248,.16),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-stage{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-stage canvas{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;padding:0;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-overlay div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;padding:.85rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-overlay span{font-weight:800;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-state{position:static;align-self:flex-start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.08);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800;color:#1d4f78}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-bars,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-formula,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-explainer{padding:1rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-bars strong.section,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-formula strong.section,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-mean{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#2563eb)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-probe{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#ef4444)}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
        #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-explainer{grid-column:1/-1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
        @media (max-width:980px){
            #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-head,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-chip{justify-self:start}
        }
        @media (max-width:640px){
            #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-presets,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-metrics,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-overlay,#z77-laminar-scene .z77b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z77-laminar-scene .z77b-stage{padding:.85rem}
        }
    </style>
    <div class='z77b-shell'>
        <div class='z77b-head'>
            <div>
                <div class='z77b-kicker'>Z77 laminarni profil brzine</div>
                <h3 class='z77b-title'>U laminarnom toku cijeli presjek nosi paraboličan profil, a sonda samo očitava koliko je od maksimalne brzine ostalo na odabranom radijusu</h3>
                <p class='z77b-sub'>Najprije biraš <strong>v<sub>max</sub></strong> i radijus cijevi <strong>R</strong>. Zatim položaj sonde <strong>r/R</strong> izravno ulazi u profil <strong>v(r) = v<sub>max</sub>(1-r²/R²)</strong>, pa odmah vidiš kako lokalna brzina pada prema stijenci i zašto je srednja brzina uvijek <strong>v<sub>sr</sub> = v<sub>max</sub>/2</strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class='z77b-chip'>v(r) = v<sub>max</sub>(1-r²/R²)</div>
        </div>

        <div class='z77b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> lijevo je bočni pogled na profil brzine u cijevi, desno isti presjek vidiš kao toplinsku kartu. Narančasta sonda označava isti položaj u oba prikaza, pa možeš povezati udaljenost od osi s lokalnom brzinom i ukupnim volumenskim protokom.</div>

        <div class='z77b-grid'>
            <div class='z77b-stage'>
                <canvas id='z77b-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
                <div class='z77b-overlay'>
                    <div><strong>v<sub>max</sub></strong><span id='z77b-ov-vmax'>2.00 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>v<sub>sr</sub></strong><span id='z77b-ov-vmean'>1.00 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>v(r)</strong><span id='z77b-ov-vprobe'>1.50 m/s</span></div>
                </div>
                <div id='z77b-state' class='z77b-state'>Sonda u srednjem pojasu</div>
            </div>

            <div class='z77b-side'>
                <div class='z77b-card z77b-controls'>
                    <div class='z77b-presets'>
                        <button type='button' class='z77b-preset' id='z77b-preset-axis'>Uz os</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z77b-preset' id='z77b-preset-mid'>Srednji radijus</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z77b-preset' id='z77b-preset-wall'>Prema stijenci</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class='z77b-row'><label for='z77b-vmax'><span>Maksimalna brzina v_max</span><span id='z77b-vmax-label'>2.0 m/s</span></label><input id='z77b-vmax' type='range' min='0.5' max='5.0' step='0.1' value='2.0'></div>
                    <div class='z77b-row'><label for='z77b-radius'><span>Polumjer cijevi R</span><span id='z77b-radius-label'>100 mm</span></label><input id='z77b-radius' type='range' min='50' max='150' step='5' value='100'></div>
                    <div class='z77b-row'><label for='z77b-probe'><span>Položaj sonde r/R</span><span id='z77b-probe-label'>0.50</span></label><input id='z77b-probe' type='range' min='0' max='1' step='0.05' value='0.50'></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z77b-card z77b-metrics'>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>v_max</small><strong id='z77b-vmax-out'>2.00 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>v_sr</small><strong id='z77b-vmean-out'>1.00 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>v(r)</small><strong id='z77b-vprobe-out'>1.50 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>Položaj sonde r</small><strong id='z77b-rprobe-out'>50 mm</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>Presjek A</small><strong id='z77b-area-out'>0.0314 m^2</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-metric'><small>Volumenski protok Vdot</small><strong id='z77b-vdot-out'>31.42 L/s</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z77b-card z77b-bars'>
                    <strong class='section'>Koliki dio v_max vidiš?</strong>
                    <div class='z77b-bar-row'><span>Srednja brzina v_sr</span><strong id='z77b-mean-label'>50.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-track'><div id='z77b-mean-bar' class='z77b-fill z77b-mean'></div></div>
                    <div class='z77b-bar-row'><span>Lokalna brzina sonde</span><strong id='z77b-probe-share-label'>75.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z77b-track'><div id='z77b-probe-bar' class='z77b-fill z77b-probe'></div></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z77b-card z77b-formula'>
                    <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
                    <div id='z77b-eq1'>v(r) = v_max (1 - (r/R)^2)</div>
                    <div id='z77b-eq2'>v_sr = v_max / 2</div>
                    <div id='z77b-eq3'>Vdot = v_sr A</div>
                </div>

                <div class='z77b-card z77b-explainer'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
                    <div id='z77b-expl'>Sonda je u srednjem pojasu presjeka, pa još mjeri velik dio maksimalne brzine. Prema stijenci profil mora pasti na nulu zbog trenja i rubnog uvjeta bez klizanja.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const root = document.getElementById('z77-laminar-scene');
    if (!root) return;

    const canvas = root.querySelector('#z77b-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const inputs = {
        vmax: root.querySelector('#z77b-vmax'),
        radius: root.querySelector('#z77b-radius'),
        probe: root.querySelector('#z77b-probe')
    };
    const labels = {
        vmax: root.querySelector('#z77b-vmax-label'),
        radius: root.querySelector('#z77b-radius-label'),
        probe: root.querySelector('#z77b-probe-label')
    };
    const out = {
        ovVmax: root.querySelector('#z77b-ov-vmax'),
        ovVmean: root.querySelector('#z77b-ov-vmean'),
        ovVprobe: root.querySelector('#z77b-ov-vprobe'),
        state: root.querySelector('#z77b-state'),
        vmax: root.querySelector('#z77b-vmax-out'),
        vmean: root.querySelector('#z77b-vmean-out'),
        vprobe: root.querySelector('#z77b-vprobe-out'),
        rprobe: root.querySelector('#z77b-rprobe-out'),
```
