```{=html}
        area: root.querySelector('#z77b-area-out'),
        vdot: root.querySelector('#z77b-vdot-out'),
        meanBar: root.querySelector('#z77b-mean-bar'),
        probeBar: root.querySelector('#z77b-probe-bar'),
        meanLabel: root.querySelector('#z77b-mean-label'),
        probeShareLabel: root.querySelector('#z77b-probe-share-label'),
        eq1: root.querySelector('#z77b-eq1'),
        eq2: root.querySelector('#z77b-eq2'),
        eq3: root.querySelector('#z77b-eq3'),
        expl: root.querySelector('#z77b-expl')
    };

    let latest = null;
    const particles = Array.from({ length: 84 }, function() {
        return { t: Math.random(), rRel: Math.random() * 2 - 1 };
    });

    function fmt(value, digits) {
        return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
    }

    function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
        const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
        ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
        ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
        ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
        ctx.closePath();
    }

    function compute() {
        const vmax = parseFloat(inputs.vmax.value);
        const rMm = parseFloat(inputs.radius.value);
        const probeRel = parseFloat(inputs.probe.value);
        const vMean = vmax / 2;
        const vProbe = vmax * (1 - probeRel * probeRel);
        const rProbe = probeRel * rMm;
        const area = Math.PI * Math.pow(rMm / 1000, 2);
        const vdot = vMean * area * 1000;
        return { vmax, rMm, probeRel, vMean, vProbe, rProbe, area, vdot, probeShare: vmax > 0 ? vProbe / vmax : 0 };
    }

    function syncText(data) {
        labels.vmax.textContent = fmt(data.vmax, 1) + ' m/s';
        labels.radius.textContent = fmt(data.rMm, 0) + ' mm';
        labels.probe.textContent = fmt(data.probeRel, 2);

        out.ovVmax.textContent = fmt(data.vmax, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.ovVmean.textContent = fmt(data.vMean, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.ovVprobe.textContent = fmt(data.vProbe, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.vmax.textContent = fmt(data.vmax, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.vmean.textContent = fmt(data.vMean, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.vprobe.textContent = fmt(data.vProbe, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.rprobe.textContent = fmt(data.rProbe, 0) + ' mm';
        out.area.textContent = fmt(data.area, 4) + ' m^2';
        out.vdot.textContent = fmt(data.vdot, 2) + ' L/s';

        out.meanBar.style.width = '50%';
        out.probeBar.style.width = (data.probeShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.meanLabel.textContent = '50.0 %';
        out.probeShareLabel.textContent = (data.probeShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

        out.eq1.textContent = 'v(r) = ' + fmt(data.vmax, 2) + ' · (1 - ' + fmt(data.probeRel, 2) + '^2) = ' + fmt(data.vProbe, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.eq2.textContent = 'v_sr = ' + fmt(data.vmax, 2) + ' / 2 = ' + fmt(data.vMean, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.eq3.textContent = 'Vdot = ' + fmt(data.vMean, 2) + ' · ' + fmt(data.area, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.vdot, 2) + ' L/s';

        if (data.probeRel < 0.2) {
            out.state.textContent = 'Sonda blizu osi';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Sonda je vrlo blizu osi cijevi, pa mjeri gotovo maksimalnu brzinu. U laminarnom toku upravo je središte presjeka energetski najbogatiji dio profila.';
        } else if (data.probeRel > 0.75) {
            out.state.textContent = 'Sonda blizu stijenke';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Sonda je pomaknuta prema stijenci, pa lokalna brzina snažno pada. To je izravna posljedica rubnog uvjeta bez klizanja: na stijenci brzina mora pasti na nulu.';
        } else {
            out.state.textContent = 'Sonda u srednjem pojasu';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Sonda je u prijelaznom dijelu presjeka: još vidi velik dio maksimalne brzine, ali već se jasno osjeća paraboličan pad prema stijenci. Zato je v(r) = ' + fmt(data.vProbe, 2) + ' m/s između osi i ruba, dok srednja brzina ostaje ' + fmt(data.vMean, 2) + ' m/s.';
        }
    }

    function drawScene(data) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const left = { x: 34, y: 58, w: 314, h: 404 };
        const right = { x: 372, y: 58, w: 314, h: 404 };
        const cy = 270;
        const radiusPx = Math.max(56, Math.min(124, data.rMm * 0.82));
        const pipeTop = cy - radiusPx;
        const pipeBottom = cy + radiusPx;
        const baseX = left.x + 30;
        const profileScale = data.vmax * 30;
        const meanX = baseX + data.vMean * 30;
        const probeY = cy + data.probeRel * radiusPx;
        const probeX = baseX + data.vProbe * 30;
        const crossCx = right.x + right.w / 2;
        const crossCy = right.y + right.h / 2 + 10;
        const crossR = Math.max(58, Math.min(112, radiusPx * 0.88));

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.78)';
        roundedRect(left.x, left.y, left.w, left.h, 22);
        ctx.fill();
        roundedRect(right.x, right.y, right.w, right.h, 22);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(148, 179, 211, .55)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 1.2;
        roundedRect(left.x, left.y, left.w, left.h, 22);
        ctx.stroke();
        roundedRect(right.x, right.y, right.w, right.h, 22);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 14px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Bočni presjek profila', left.x + 18, left.y + 26);
        ctx.fillText('Poprečni presjek', right.x + 18, right.y + 26);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(left.x + 14, pipeTop);
        ctx.lineTo(left.x + left.w - 16, pipeTop);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(left.x + 14, pipeBottom);
        ctx.lineTo(left.x + left.w - 16, pipeBottom);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,.16)';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(baseX, pipeTop);
        for (let y = -radiusPx; y <= radiusPx; y += 2) {
            const rel = y / radiusPx;
            const vRel = 1 - rel * rel;
            ctx.lineTo(baseX + vRel * profileScale, cy + y);
        }
        ctx.lineTo(baseX, pipeBottom);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(37,99,235,.45)';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(baseX, pipeTop);
        for (let y = -radiusPx; y <= radiusPx; y += 2) {
            const rel = y / radiusPx;
            const vRel = 1 - rel * rel;
            ctx.lineTo(baseX + vRel * profileScale, cy + y);
        }
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([5, 5]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#0ea5e9';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(meanX, pipeTop - 6);
        ctx.lineTo(meanX, pipeBottom + 6);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#0369a1';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v_sr', meanX - 12, pipeTop - 16);

        particles.forEach(function(p) {
            p.t += (0.0025 + data.vmax * 0.0008) * (1 - p.rRel * p.rRel);
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const px = left.x + 22 + p.t * (left.w - 44);
            const py = cy + p.rRel * radiusPx;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(baseX - 10, probeY);
        ctx.lineTo(probeX, probeY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(probeX, probeY, 5.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.fillStyle = '#991b1b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('v(r)', probeX + 10, probeY - 10);

        for (let r = crossR; r > 0; r -= 2) {
            const rel = r / crossR;
            const vRel = 1 - rel * rel;
            const rr = Math.floor(233 - vRel * 160);
            const gg = Math.floor(243 - vRel * 100);
            ctx.fillStyle = 'rgb(' + rr + ',' + gg + ',255)';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(crossCx, crossCy, r, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 4;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(crossCx, crossCy, crossR, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([7, 6]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(crossCx, crossCy);
        ctx.lineTo(crossCx + data.probeRel * crossR, crossCy);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(crossCx + data.probeRel * crossR, crossCy, 5.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#36506b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('os cijevi', left.x + 16, cy - 10);
        ctx.fillText('r/R = ' + fmt(data.probeRel, 2), right.x + 18, right.y + right.h - 18);
        ctx.fillText('stijenka: v = 0', left.x + left.w - 120, pipeBottom + 28);
    }

    function update() {
        latest = compute();
        syncText(latest);
    }

    function loop() {
        if (latest) drawScene(latest);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
        input.addEventListener('input', update);
        input.addEventListener('change', update);
    });

    root.querySelector('#z77b-preset-axis').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vmax.value = '2.5';
        inputs.radius.value = '100';
        inputs.probe.value = '0.10';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z77b-preset-mid').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vmax.value = '2.0';
        inputs.radius.value = '100';
        inputs.probe.value = '0.50';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z77b-preset-wall').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vmax.value = '3.2';
        inputs.radius.value = '120';
        inputs.probe.value = '0.85';
        update();
    });

    update();
    loop();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z78 â€” Difuzor bez gubitaka {.unnumbered}

 
78. Voda na slici struji kroz cijev promjenjivog poprečnog presjeka od točke A (promjer u točki A iznosi 300 mm), do točke B (promjer u točki B iznosi 600 mm), volumenski protok pritom iznosi 375 $dm^3/s$. Tlačna visina dobave u točki A iznosi 6,75 m. Ukoliko pretpostavimo da nema gubitaka strujanja od točke A do točke B, potrebno je odrediti tlačnu visinu dobave u točki B.


**Zadano:** $d_A = 0,3 \, \text{m}, d_B = 0,6 \, \text{m}, \dot{V} = 0,375 \, \text{m}^3\text{/s}, H_A = 6,75 \, \text{m}, z_A = 3 \, \text{m}, z_B = 7,6 \, \text{m}$  
**Odrediti:** tlačnu visinu dobave u točki B $H_B$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Gubici uslijed strujanja se zanemaruju.

**Rješenje:**
1. $v_A = \frac{\dot{V}}{A_A} = 5,3 \text{ m/s}, v_B = \frac{\dot{V}}{A_B} = 1,326 \text{ m/s}$.
2. Bernoulli (A-B): $H_A = H_B \implies H_B = H_A + (z_A - z_B) + \frac{v_A^2 - v_B^2}{2g}$.

***

### Zadatak Z79 â€” Pad tlaka u konfuzoru {.unnumbered}

 
79. Horizontalnom ventilacijskom kanalu smanjuje se poprečni presjek sa $0,07 m^2$ na $0,0185 m^2$. Zanemarimo li gubitke strujanja, potrebno je odrediti kolika će biti promjena tlaka ukoliko maseni protok zraka iznosi $0,68 kg/s$? Gustoća zraka za tlak i temperaturu sustava iznosi 1,2 $kg/m^3$.


**Zadano:** $A_1 = 0,07 \, \text{m}^2, A_2 = 0,0185 \, \text{m}^2, \dot{m} = 0,68 \, \text{kg/s}, \rho = 1,2 \, \text{kg/m}^3$  
**Odrediti:** pad tlaka $\Delta p$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Gubici uslijed strujanja se zanemaruju.

**Rješenje:**
$\Delta p = \frac{\rho}{2}(v_2^2 - v_1^2) = \frac{1,2}{2}(30,63^2 - 8,1^2) = \mathbf{523 \text{ Pa}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Venturijeva cijev -->
<div id="v9-venturi-legacy" style="display:none;max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🧪 Venturijeva cijev: Mjerenje protoka</h4>
    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati Venturi:</strong> U suženju je površina manja pa iz kontinuiteta mora porasti lokalna brzina <strong>v₂</strong>. Bernoulli zatim taj porast brzine prevodi u pad statičkog tlaka, pa manometarska razlika <strong>Δh</strong> postaje vizualni trag iste energetske zamjene.
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 400px;">
            <canvas id="v9-venturi-canvas" width="550" height="400" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Ulazna brzina v₁: <span id="v9-v-v1" style="color:#2563eb;">2.0</span> m/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="v9-v1-slider" min="0.5" max="8" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Promjer suženja D₂: <span id="v9-v-d2" style="color:#2563eb;">60</span> mm</label>
                <input type="range" id="v9-d2-slider" min="30" max="90" step="2" value="60" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 12px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-weight: 800; font-size: 0.75rem; color: #2c5282; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px;">Rezultati:</div>
                <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; font-size: 0.95rem;">
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Brzina v₂:</span> <b id="v9-res-v2">--- m/s</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Δh:</span> <b id="v9-res-dh">--- mm</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between;"><span>Δp:</span> <b id="v9-res-dp">--- Pa</b></div>
                    <div style="display: flex; justify-content: space-between; border-top: 1px solid #bee3f8; padding-top: 8px; margin-top: 4px;"><span>V̇:</span> <b id="v9-res-vdot">--- L/s</b></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">A₁</div>
                    <div id="v9-res-a1" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">A₂</div>
                    <div id="v9-res-a2" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0000</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Omjer A₂/A₁</div>
                    <div id="v9-res-aratio" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="v9-venturi-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('v9-venturi-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const v1S = document.getElementById('v9-v1-slider'), d2S = document.getElementById('v9-d2-slider');
    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push({ x: Math.random() * 550, y_rel: Math.random() });
    function update() {
        const v1 = parseFloat(v1S.value), d2 = parseFloat(d2S.value)/1000, d1 = 0.1, rho = 1000, g = 9.81;
        const a1 = Math.PI * d1 * d1 / 4;
        const a2 = Math.PI * d2 * d2 / 4;
        const vdot = v1 * a1;
        const v2 = vdot / a2;
        const dp = 0.5*rho*(v2*v2-v1*v1), dh = dp/(rho*g);
        document.getElementById('v9-v-v1').innerText = v1.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('v9-v-d2').innerText = (d2*1000).toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('v9-res-v2').innerText = v2.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-dh').innerText = (dh*1000).toFixed(1) + " mm";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-dp').innerText = Math.round(dp) + " Pa";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-vdot').innerText = (vdot*1000).toFixed(2) + " L/s";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-a1').innerText = a1.toFixed(4) + " m²";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-a2').innerText = a2.toFixed(4) + " m²";
        document.getElementById('v9-res-aratio').innerText = (a2 / a1).toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('v9-venturi-explainer').textContent = `Ulazni presjek A₁ = ${a1.toFixed(4)} m² nosi protok ${vdot.toFixed(4)} m³/s pri brzini ${v1.toFixed(2)} m/s. Kad se suženjem presjek smanji na A₂ = ${a2.toFixed(4)} m², brzina mora porasti na ${v2.toFixed(2)} m/s, pa Bernoulli daje pad tlaka od ${Math.round(dp)} Pa i manometarsku razliku ${ (dh * 1000).toFixed(1) } mm.`;
        draw(v1, v2, dh, d1, d2);
    }
    function draw(v1, v2, dh, d1, d2) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,550,400); const scale = 1500, cx = 275, cy = 250, d1_px = d1*scale, d2_px = d2*scale;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#f1f5f9"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,cy-d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(150,cy-d1_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(220,cy-d1_px/2,230,cy-d2_px/2,275,cy-d2_px/2); ctx.bezierCurveTo(320,cy-d2_px/2,330,cy-d1_px/2,400,cy-d1_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(550,cy-d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(550,cy+d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(400,cy+d1_px/2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(330,cy+d1_px/2,320,cy+d2_px/2,275,cy+d2_px/2); ctx.bezierCurveTo(230,cy+d2_px/2,220,cy+d1_px/2,150,cy+d1_px/2);
        ctx.lineTo(0,cy+d1_px/2); ctx.fill(); ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();
        const m1_x = 100, m2_x = 275, h_base = 150, dh_px = dh*scale*0.2;
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#94a3b8"; ctx.lineWidth = 15; ctx.lineCap = "round";
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(m1_x,cy-d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(m1_x,h_base); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(m2_x,cy-d2_px/2); ctx.lineTo(m2_x,h_base+dh_px); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth = 11;
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(m1_x,cy-d1_px/2); ctx.lineTo(m1_x,h_base+20); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(m2_x,cy-d2_px/2); ctx.lineTo(m2_x,h_base+dh_px+20); ctx.stroke();
        particles.forEach(p => {
            let local_d = d1_px; if(p.x>150 && p.x<400) { const t = Math.abs(p.x-275)/125; local_d = d2_px+(d1_px-d2_px)*t*t; }
            p.x += (d1_px/local_d)*v1*5; if(p.x>550) p.x = 0;
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(p.x, cy+(p.y_rel-0.5)*local_d*0.8, 2, 0, Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });
    }
    v1S.oninput = update; d2S.oninput = update; update();
    function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); } anim();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='v9-venturi-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
    <style>
        #v9-venturi-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(14,165,233,.16),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-stage{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-stage canvas{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;padding:0;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-overlay div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;padding:.85rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-overlay span{font-weight:800;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-state{position:static;align-self:flex-start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.08);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-state.mild{color:#0f766e;border-color:#99f6e4;background:rgba(240,253,250,.95)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-state.medium{color:#b45309;border-color:#fdba74;background:rgba(255,247,237,.95)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-state.strong{color:#b91c1c;border-color:#fca5a5;background:rgba(254,242,242,.95)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-bars,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-formula,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-explainer{padding:1rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-bars strong.section,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-formula strong.section,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-area{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#38bdf8,#2563eb)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-speed{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f97316,#ef4444)}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
        #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-explainer{grid-column:1/-1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
        @media (max-width:980px){
            #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-head,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-chip{justify-self:start}
        }
        @media (max-width:640px){
            #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-presets,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-metrics,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-overlay,#v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #v9-venturi-scene .v9vb-stage{padding:.85rem}
        }
    </style>
    <div class='v9vb-shell'>
        <div class='v9vb-head'>
            <div>
                <div class='v9vb-kicker'>Venturi i mjerenje protoka</div>
                <h3 class='v9vb-title'>Venturi ne mjeri protok izravno, nego najprije prisili tok da ubrza u suženju, a zatim očita tlačnu cijenu tog ubrzanja</h3>
                <p class='v9vb-sub'>Kontinuitet prvo veže presjeke i brzine kroz <strong>A<sub>1</sub>v<sub>1</sub> = A<sub>2</sub>v<sub>2</sub></strong>. Bernoulli zatim taj skok brzine pretvara u pad statičkog tlaka, pa piezometarska razlika <strong>Δh</strong> postaje vizualni trag iste zamjene energije.</p>
            </div>
            <div class='v9vb-chip'>A<sub>1</sub>v<sub>1</sub> = A<sub>2</sub>v<sub>2</sub></div>
        </div>

        <div class='v9vb-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> lijevo i desno vidiš široki presjek cijevi, a u grlu Venturija uži presjek i veće brzine čestica. Iznad njih su piezometarske cijevi koje ne mjere brzinu, nego upravo statički tlak, pa njihova razlika pokazuje koliko je tlaka potrošeno na ubrzanje toka.</div>

        <div class='v9vb-grid'>
            <div class='v9vb-stage'>
                <canvas id='v9vb-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
                <div class='v9vb-overlay'>
                    <div><strong>v<sub>1</sub></strong><span id='v9vb-ov-v1'>2.00 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>v<sub>2</sub></strong><span id='v9vb-ov-v2'>5.56 m/s</span></div>
                    <div><strong>Δh</strong><span id='v9vb-ov-dh'>1370.0 mm</span></div>
                </div>
                <div id='v9vb-state' class='v9vb-state medium'>Srednje suženje</div>
            </div>

            <div class='v9vb-side'>
                <div class='v9vb-card v9vb-controls'>
                    <div class='v9vb-presets'>
                        <button type='button' class='v9vb-preset' id='v9vb-preset-mild'>Blago</button>
                        <button type='button' class='v9vb-preset' id='v9vb-preset-mid'>Srednje</button>
                        <button type='button' class='v9vb-preset' id='v9vb-preset-strong'>Jako</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class='v9vb-row'><label for='v9vb-v1'><span>Ulazna brzina v1</span><span id='v9vb-v1-label'>2.0 m/s</span></label><input id='v9vb-v1' type='range' min='0.5' max='8.0' step='0.1' value='2.0'></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-row'><label for='v9vb-d2'><span>Promjer grla D2</span><span id='v9vb-d2-label'>60 mm</span></label><input id='v9vb-d2' type='range' min='30' max='90' step='2' value='60'></div>
                </div>

                <div class='v9vb-card v9vb-metrics'>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>A1</small><strong id='v9vb-a1'>0.0079 m^2</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>A2</small><strong id='v9vb-a2'>0.0028 m^2</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>v2</small><strong id='v9vb-v2'>5.56 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>Δp</small><strong id='v9vb-dp'>13424 Pa</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>Δh</small><strong id='v9vb-dh'>1368.4 mm</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-metric'><small>Vdot</small><strong id='v9vb-vdot'>15.71 L/s</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class='v9vb-card v9vb-bars'>
                    <strong class='section'>Kontinuitet i posljedica</strong>
                    <div class='v9vb-bar-row'><span>Preostali presjek A2/A1</span><strong id='v9vb-area-label'>36.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-track'><div id='v9vb-area-bar' class='v9vb-fill v9vb-area'></div></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-bar-row'><span>Pojačanje brzine v2/v1</span><strong id='v9vb-speed-label'>2.78x</strong></div>
                    <div class='v9vb-track'><div id='v9vb-speed-bar' class='v9vb-fill v9vb-speed'></div></div>
                </div>

                <div class='v9vb-card v9vb-formula'>
                    <strong class='section'>Računski lanac</strong>
                    <div id='v9vb-eq1'>v2 = v1 A1 / A2</div>
                    <div id='v9vb-eq2'>Δp = ρ (v2^2 - v1^2) / 2</div>
                    <div id='v9vb-eq3'>Δh = Δp / (ρg)</div>
                </div>

                <div class='v9vb-card v9vb-explainer'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
                    <div id='v9vb-expl'>Kad se presjek smanji, kontinuitet prisili tok na veću lokalnu brzinu u grlu. Bernoulli tada dio statičkog tlaka pretvara u brzinsku energiju, pa piezometar u grlu pada niže od ulaznog.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const root = document.getElementById('v9-venturi-scene');
    if (!root) return;

    const canvas = root.querySelector('#v9vb-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const inputs = {
        v1: root.querySelector('#v9vb-v1'),
        d2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-d2')
    };
    const labels = {
        v1: root.querySelector('#v9vb-v1-label'),
        d2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-d2-label')
    };
    const out = {
        ovV1: root.querySelector('#v9vb-ov-v1'),
        ovV2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-ov-v2'),
        ovDh: root.querySelector('#v9vb-ov-dh'),
        state: root.querySelector('#v9vb-state'),
        a1: root.querySelector('#v9vb-a1'),
        a2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-a2'),
        v2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-v2'),
        dp: root.querySelector('#v9vb-dp'),
        dh: root.querySelector('#v9vb-dh'),
        vdot: root.querySelector('#v9vb-vdot'),
        areaBar: root.querySelector('#v9vb-area-bar'),
        speedBar: root.querySelector('#v9vb-speed-bar'),
        areaLabel: root.querySelector('#v9vb-area-label'),
        speedLabel: root.querySelector('#v9vb-speed-label'),
        eq1: root.querySelector('#v9vb-eq1'),
        eq2: root.querySelector('#v9vb-eq2'),
        eq3: root.querySelector('#v9vb-eq3'),
        expl: root.querySelector('#v9vb-expl')
    };

    const d1 = 0.1;
    const rho = 1000;
    const g = 9.81;
    const particles = Array.from({ length: 110 }, function() {
        return { t: Math.random(), yRel: Math.random() };
    });
    let latest = null;

    function fmt(value, digits) {
        return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
    }

    function compute() {
        const v1 = parseFloat(inputs.v1.value);
        const d2 = parseFloat(inputs.d2.value) / 1000;
        const a1 = Math.PI * d1 * d1 / 4;
        const a2 = Math.PI * d2 * d2 / 4;
        const vdot = v1 * a1;
        const v2 = vdot / a2;
        const dp = 0.5 * rho * (v2 * v2 - v1 * v1);
        const dh = dp / (rho * g);
        const areaRatio = a2 / a1;
        const speedRatio = v2 / v1;
        return { v1, d2, a1, a2, vdot, v2, dp, dh, areaRatio, speedRatio };
    }

    function syncText(data) {
        labels.v1.textContent = fmt(data.v1, 1) + ' m/s';
        labels.d2.textContent = fmt(data.d2 * 1000, 0) + ' mm';

        out.ovV1.textContent = fmt(data.v1, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.ovV2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.ovDh.textContent = fmt(data.dh * 1000, 1) + ' mm';

        out.a1.textContent = fmt(data.a1, 4) + ' m^2';
        out.a2.textContent = fmt(data.a2, 4) + ' m^2';
        out.v2.textContent = fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.dp.textContent = Math.round(data.dp) + ' Pa';
        out.dh.textContent = fmt(data.dh * 1000, 1) + ' mm';
        out.vdot.textContent = fmt(data.vdot * 1000, 2) + ' L/s';

        out.areaBar.style.width = (data.areaRatio * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.speedBar.style.width = Math.min(data.speedRatio / 6 * 100, 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.areaLabel.textContent = (data.areaRatio * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
        out.speedLabel.textContent = data.speedRatio.toFixed(2) + 'x';

        out.eq1.textContent = 'v2 = ' + fmt(data.v1, 2) + ' · ' + fmt(data.a1, 4) + ' / ' + fmt(data.a2, 4) + ' = ' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.eq2.textContent = 'Δp = 1000 · (' + fmt(data.v2, 2) + '^2 - ' + fmt(data.v1, 2) + '^2) / 2 = ' + Math.round(data.dp) + ' Pa';
        out.eq3.textContent = 'Δh = ' + Math.round(data.dp) + ' / (1000 · 9.81) = ' + fmt(data.dh * 1000, 1) + ' mm';

        if (data.areaRatio > 0.60) {
            out.state.className = 'v9vb-state mild';
            out.state.textContent = 'Blago suženje';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Grlo je još relativno široko, pa su porast brzine i pad statičkog tlaka umjereni. Piezometarska razlika postoji, ali nije dramatična jer kontinuitet ne mora snažno ubrzati tok.';
        } else if (data.areaRatio > 0.35) {
            out.state.className = 'v9vb-state medium';
            out.state.textContent = 'Srednje suženje';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Smanjenje presjeka je dovoljno jako da v2 značajno naraste u odnosu na v1. Bernoulli zato prevodi dio statičkog tlaka u brzinsku energiju i piezometar u grlu jasno pada ispod ulaznog.';
        } else {
            out.state.className = 'v9vb-state strong';
            out.state.textContent = 'Jako suženje';
            out.expl.textContent = 'Grlo je vrlo usko, pa kontinuitet traži veliko ubrzanje toka. Zato je tlak u grlu snažno snižen, a piezometarska razlika postaje velik vizualni trag cijene koju protok plaća za nagli porast brzine.';
        }
    }

    function getLocalDiameter(x, d1Px, d2Px) {
        if (x <= 180) return d1Px;
        if (x < 300) {
            const t = (x - 180) / 120;
            return d1Px + (d2Px - d1Px) * t;
        }
        if (x <= 420) return d2Px;
        if (x < 540) {
            const t = (x - 420) / 120;
            return d2Px + (d1Px - d2Px) * t;
        }
        return d1Px;
    }

    function drawScene(data) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const cy = 310;
        const d1Px = d1 * 1500;
        const d2Px = data.d2 * 1500;
        const pipeTop1 = cy - d1Px / 2;
        const headBaseY = 112;
        const dhPx = Math.min(170, Math.sqrt(Math.max(data.dh * 1000, 0)) * 4.8);
        const level1 = headBaseY;
        const level2 = headBaseY + dhPx;
        const m1x = 136;
        const m2x = 360;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#eef4fa';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(0, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(180, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(230, cy - d1Px / 2, 260, cy - d2Px / 2, 300, cy - d2Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(420, cy - d2Px / 2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(460, cy - d2Px / 2, 490, cy - d1Px / 2, 540, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(720, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(720, cy + d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(540, cy + d1Px / 2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(490, cy + d1Px / 2, 460, cy + d2Px / 2, 420, cy + d2Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(300, cy + d2Px / 2);
        ctx.bezierCurveTo(260, cy + d2Px / 2, 230, cy + d1Px / 2, 180, cy + d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(0, cy + d1Px / 2);
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#475569';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 14;
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(m1x, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(m1x, headBaseY - 8);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(m2x, cy - d2Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(m2x, headBaseY - 8 + dhPx);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#3b82f6';
        ctx.lineWidth = 10;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(m1x, cy - d1Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(m1x, level1 + 20);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(m2x, cy - d2Px / 2);
        ctx.lineTo(m2x, level2 + 20);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.setLineDash([6, 4]);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f97316';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(m2x + 34, level1 + 10);
        ctx.lineTo(m2x + 34, level2 + 10);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#c2410c';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Δh', m2x + 42, level1 + dhPx / 2 + 14);
        ctx.fillText('komprimirana skala piezometra', 448, 88);

        particles.forEach(function(p) {
            const x = p.t * 720;
            const localD = getLocalDiameter(x, d1Px, d2Px);
            const velocityFactor = Math.pow(d1Px / localD, 2) * (data.v1 / 3.2);
            p.t += 0.0018 + velocityFactor * 0.0016;
            if (p.t > 1) p.t = 0;
            const currentX = p.t * 720;
            const currentD = getLocalDiameter(currentX, d1Px, d2Px);
            const y = cy + (p.yRel - 0.5) * currentD * 0.72;
            ctx.fillStyle = '#3b82f6';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(currentX, y, 2.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        });

        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('A1, v1', 78, cy + d1Px / 2 + 26);
        ctx.fillText('A2, v2', 330, cy + d2Px / 2 + 26);
        ctx.fillText('široki presjek', 78, 470);
        ctx.fillText('grlo Venturija', 312, 470);
    }

    function update() {
        latest = compute();
        syncText(latest);
    }

    function loop() {
        if (latest) drawScene(latest);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
        input.addEventListener('input', update);
        input.addEventListener('change', update);
    });

    root.querySelector('#v9vb-preset-mild').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.v1.value = '1.6';
        inputs.d2.value = '84';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#v9vb-preset-mid').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.v1.value = '2.0';
        inputs.d2.value = '60';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#v9vb-preset-strong').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.v1.value = '4.5';
        inputs.d2.value = '40';
        update();
    });

    update();
    loop();
})();
</script>
```

***

### Zadatak Z80 â€” Usisna visina pumpe {.unnumbered}

 
80. Usisna cijev pumpe promjera 100 mm, prikazana na slici, crpi 0,03 $m^3/s$ ulja relativne gustoće 0,85. Ukoliko podtlak u točki A usisne cijevi iznosi 180 mmHg, potrebno je odrediti ukupnu visinu dobave u točki A s obzirom na položaj pumpe.


**Zadano:** $d_1 = 0,1 \, \text{m}, \dot{V} = 0,03 \, \text{m}^3\text{/s}, \bar{\rho}_u = 0,85, \Delta h_{AHg} = -0,18 \, \text{mHg}, h_A = 1,2 \, \text{m}$  
**Odrediti:** visinu dobave u točki A $H_A$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv, gubici uslijed strujanja su zanemareni.

***

### Zadatak Z81 â€” Ukupna visina dobave pumpe {.unnumbered}

 
81. Na slici je prikazana pumpa koja crpi vodu iz spremnika do otvora izloženog atmosferskom tlaku, točka B. Podtlak u točki A u usisnoj cijevi iznosi 25 mmHg, pri čemu volumenski protok iznosi 0,085 $m^3/s$. Potrebno je odrediti ukupnu visinu dobave u točkama A i B s obzirom na položaj dna spremnika.


**Zadano:** $d_1 = 0,25 \, \text{m}, d_2 = 0,2 \, \text{m}, h_1 = 7,5 \, \text{m}, h_2 = 12 \, \text{m}, h_3 = 24 \, \text{m}, \dot{V} = 0,085 \, \text{m}^3\text{/s}, \rho_v = 998 \, \text{kg/m}^3, \Delta h_{AHg} = -0,025 \, \text{mHg}$  
**Odrediti:** visinu dobave u točkama A i B ($H_A$ i $H_B$)

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv, gubici uslijed strujanja su zanemareni.

**Rješenje:**
*   **Zadatak 80:** $H_A = \frac{p_A}{\rho g} + \frac{v_A^2}{2g} + z_A = \mathbf{-3,33 \text{ m}}$.
*   **Zadatak 81:** $H_A = \mathbf{7,31 \text{ m}}, H_B = \mathbf{24,37 \text{ m}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Pumpni sustav i visine dobave -->
<div id="z80-pump-legacy" style="display:none;max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">⚙️ Pumpni sustav: Analiza visina dobave (A i B)</h4>
    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati pumpu:</strong> Ukupna visina dobave u svakoj točki sastoji se od tlačne, brzinske i geodetske komponente. Pumpa ne "stvara tlak" izdvojeno, nego dodaje razliku energije <strong>H<sub>p</sub> = H<sub>B</sub> - H<sub>A</sub></strong> potrebnu da tok iz usisa dođe do više i energijski bogatije izlazne točke.
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
            <canvas id="z80-pump-canvas" width="550" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="z80-label-A" style="position: absolute; left: 130px; top: 320px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #3b82f6;"><b>Točka A</b><br>H_A: <span id="z80-res-ha">7.31</span> m</div>
            <div id="z80-label-B" style="position: absolute; left: 380px; top: 120px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.9); padding: 5px 10px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 0.7rem; border: 1px solid #ef4444;"><b>Točka B</b><br>H_B: <span id="z80-res-hb">24.37</span> m</div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 20px;">
            <div style="padding: 20px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Protok V̇: <span id="z80-v-vdot">0.15</span> m³/s</label>
                <input type="range" id="z80-vdot-slider" min="0.05" max="0.3" step="0.01" value="0.15" style="width: 100%;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; margin-top: 20px; margin-bottom: 10px; color: #475569;">Visina isporuke (B): <span id="z80-v-zb">20</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z80-zb-slider" min="15" max="30" step="1" value="20" style="width: 100%;">
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.85rem;">Snaga pumpe H_p: <b id="z80-res-hp">17.06 m</b></div>
                <div style="height: 25px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; margin-top: 10px;">
                    <div id="z80-bar-ha" style="width: 30%; background: #3b82f6;"></div>
                    <div id="z80-bar-hp" style="width: 70%; background: #ef4444;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v_A</div>
                    <div id="z80-res-va" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v_B</div>
                    <div id="z80-res-vb" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m/s</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p_A/ρg</div>
                    <div id="z80-res-pah" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p_B/ρg</div>
                    <div id="z80-res-pbh" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z80-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z80-pump-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const vdotS = document.getElementById('z80-vdot-slider'), zbS = document.getElementById('z80-zb-slider');
    let particles = [];
    for(let i=0; i<150; i++) particles.push({ t: Math.random(), branch: Math.random() > 0.5 ? 'suction' : 'discharge' });
    function update() {
        const vdot = parseFloat(vdotS.value), zb = parseFloat(zbS.value), g = 9.81, rho = 1000;
        const d1 = 0.25, d2 = 0.20, v1 = vdot/(Math.PI*d1*d1/4), v2 = vdot/(Math.PI*d2*d2/4), za = 10;
        const pa = 50000, pb = 100000;
        const pHeadA = pa/(rho*g), pHeadB = pb/(rho*g);
        const ha = pHeadA + (v1*v1)/(2*g) + za, hb = pHeadB + (v2*v2)/(2*g) + zb, hp = hb-ha;
        document.getElementById('z80-v-vdot').innerText = vdot.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z80-v-zb').innerText = zb.toFixed(0);
        document.getElementById('z80-res-ha').innerText = ha.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z80-res-hb').innerText = hb.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z80-res-hp').innerText = hp.toFixed(2);
        document.getElementById('z80-res-va').innerText = v1.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z80-res-vb').innerText = v2.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z80-res-pah').innerText = pHeadA.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z80-res-pbh').innerText = pHeadB.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z80-explainer').textContent = `Na usisu je ukupna visina H_A = ${ha.toFixed(2)} m sastavljena od tlačne komponente ${pHeadA.toFixed(2)} m, brzinske komponente ${((v1*v1)/(2*g)).toFixed(2)} m i geodetske visine ${za.toFixed(2)} m. Na izlazu je H_B = ${hb.toFixed(2)} m, pa pumpa mora dodati ${hp.toFixed(2)} m ukupne energije da bi tok stigao do više razine i većeg izlaznog energetskog stanja.`;
        document.getElementById('z80-bar-ha').style.width = (ha/(ha+hp)*100)+"%";
        document.getElementById('z80-bar-hp').style.width = (hp/(ha+hp)*100)+"%";
        draw(za, zb, v1, v2);
    }
    function draw(za, zb, v1, v2) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,550,450); const scale = 12, ox = 100, oy = 400;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf8ff"; ctx.fillRect(20,oy-100,100,100); ctx.fillRect(400,oy-zb*scale-50,100,100);
        ctx.strokeStyle = "#475569"; ctx.lineWidth = 3; ctx.strokeRect(20,oy-100,100,100); ctx.strokeRect(400,oy-zb*scale-50,100,100);
        ctx.lineWidth = 15; ctx.strokeStyle = "#cbd5e0"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(70,oy-50); ctx.lineTo(70,oy-za*scale); ctx.lineTo(250,oy-za*scale); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(300,oy-za*scale); ctx.lineTo(450,oy-za*scale); ctx.lineTo(450,oy-zb*scale); ctx.stroke();
        ctx.fillStyle = "#1e293b"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(275,oy-za*scale,30,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        particles.forEach(p => {
            p.t += 0.005*(p.branch==='suction'?v1:v2); if(p.t>1) p.t = 0;
            let px, py; if(p.branch==='suction') { if(p.t<0.4) {px=70; py=(oy-50)-p.t/0.4*(za*scale-50);} else {px=70+(p.t-0.4)/0.6*180; py=oy-za*scale;} }
            else { if(p.t<0.4) {px=300+p.t/0.4*150; py=oy-za*scale;} else {px=450; py=(oy-za*scale)-(p.t-0.4)/0.6*(zb-za)*scale;} }
            ctx.fillStyle = "#3b82f6"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px,py,2,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
        });
    }
    vdotS.oninput = update; zbS.oninput = update; update();
    function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); } anim();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='z80-pump-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
    <style>
        #z80-pump-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(14,165,233,.14),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-stage{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-stage canvas{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;padding:0;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-overlay div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;padding:.85rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-overlay span{font-weight:800;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-row input{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-bars,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-formula,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-explainer{padding:1rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-bars strong.section,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-formula strong.section,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-base{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#3b82f6,#1d4ed8)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-pump{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f97316,#ef4444)}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
        #z80-pump-scene .z80b-explainer{grid-column:1/-1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
        @media (max-width:980px){
            #z80-pump-scene .z80b-head,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z80-pump-scene .z80b-chip{justify-self:start}
        }
        @media (max-width:640px){
            #z80-pump-scene .z80b-presets,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-metrics,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-overlay,#z80-pump-scene .z80b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z80-pump-scene .z80b-stage{padding:.85rem}
        }
    </style>
    <div class='z80b-shell'>
        <div class='z80b-head'>
            <div>
                <div class='z80b-kicker'>Z80-Z81 visina dobave pumpe</div>
                <h3 class='z80b-title'>Pumpa ne dodaje samo tlak, nego ukupnu energiju potrebnu da tok iz točke A dođe do bogatijeg stanja u točki B</h3>
                <p class='z80b-sub'>Najprije u svakoj točki rastavljaš ukupnu visinu na tlačnu, brzinsku i geodetsku komponentu. Tek nakon toga uspoređuješ <strong>H<sub>A</sub></strong> i <strong>H<sub>B</sub></strong>, pa dobivaš koliko pumpa stvarno mora dodati: <strong>H<sub>p</sub> = H<sub>B</sub> - H<sub>A</sub></strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class='z80b-chip'>H<sub>B</sub> = H<sub>A</sub> + H<sub>p</sub></div>
        </div>

        <div class='z80b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> lijevo je točka A na usisu, desno točka B na višem izlazu. Stupci energije pokazuju kako se <strong>z</strong>, <strong>v²/2g</strong> i <strong>p/ρg</strong> slažu u ukupne visine <strong>H<sub>A</sub></strong> i <strong>H<sub>B</sub></strong>, dok je narančasti skok između njih upravo posao pumpe.</div>

        <div class='z80b-grid'>
            <div class='z80b-stage'>
                <canvas id='z80b-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
                <div class='z80b-overlay'>
                    <div><strong>H<sub>A</sub></strong><span id='z80b-ov-ha'>7.31 m</span></div>
                    <div><strong>H<sub>B</sub></strong><span id='z80b-ov-hb'>24.37 m</span></div>
                    <div><strong>H<sub>p</sub></strong><span id='z80b-ov-hp'>17.06 m</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div class='z80b-side'>
                <div class='z80b-card z80b-controls'>
                    <div class='z80b-presets'>
                        <button type='button' class='z80b-preset' id='z80b-preset-base'>Početni</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z80b-preset' id='z80b-preset-flow'>Veći protok</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z80b-preset' id='z80b-preset-lift'>Viši izlaz</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class='z80b-row'><label for='z80b-vdot'><span>Volumenski protok V̇</span><span id='z80b-vdot-label'>0.15 m^3/s</span></label><input id='z80b-vdot' type='range' min='0.05' max='0.30' step='0.01' value='0.15'></div>
                    <div class='z80b-row'><label for='z80b-zb'><span>Geodetska visina izlaza z_B</span><span id='z80b-zb-label'>20 m</span></label><input id='z80b-zb' type='range' min='15' max='30' step='1' value='20'></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z80b-card z80b-metrics'>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>v_A</small><strong id='z80b-va'>3.06 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>v_B</small><strong id='z80b-vb'>4.77 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>p_A/ρg</small><strong id='z80b-pah'>5.10 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>p_B/ρg</small><strong id='z80b-pbh'>10.19 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>H_A</small><strong id='z80b-ha'>7.31 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-metric'><small>H_B</small><strong id='z80b-hb'>24.37 m</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z80b-card z80b-bars'>
                    <strong class='section'>Kako nastaje H_B?</strong>
                    <div class='z80b-bar-row'><span>Energija već prisutna u A</span><strong id='z80b-base-label'>30.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-track'><div id='z80b-base-bar' class='z80b-fill z80b-base'></div></div>
                    <div class='z80b-bar-row'><span>Dodatak pumpe H_p</span><strong id='z80b-pump-label'>70.0 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z80b-track'><div id='z80b-pump-bar' class='z80b-fill z80b-pump'></div></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z80b-card z80b-formula'>
                    <strong class='section'>Lanac Bernoullija</strong>
                    <div id='z80b-eq1'>H_A = p_A/ρg + v_A^2/2g + z_A</div>
                    <div id='z80b-eq2'>H_B = p_B/ρg + v_B^2/2g + z_B</div>
                    <div id='z80b-eq3'>H_p = H_B - H_A</div>
                </div>

                <div class='z80b-card z80b-explainer'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
                    <div id='z80b-expl'>Pumpa mora nadoknaditi razliku između raspoložive energije na usisu i traženog energetskog stanja na višem izlazu.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const root = document.getElementById('z80-pump-scene');
    if (!root) return;

    const canvas = root.querySelector('#z80b-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const inputs = {
        vdot: root.querySelector('#z80b-vdot'),
        zb: root.querySelector('#z80b-zb')
    };
    const labels = {
        vdot: root.querySelector('#z80b-vdot-label'),
        zb: root.querySelector('#z80b-zb-label')
    };
    const out = {
        va: root.querySelector('#z80b-va'),
        vb: root.querySelector('#z80b-vb'),
        pah: root.querySelector('#z80b-pah'),
        pbh: root.querySelector('#z80b-pbh'),
        ha: root.querySelector('#z80b-ha'),
        hb: root.querySelector('#z80b-hb'),
        ovHa: root.querySelector('#z80b-ov-ha'),
        ovHb: root.querySelector('#z80b-ov-hb'),
        ovHp: root.querySelector('#z80b-ov-hp'),
        baseBar: root.querySelector('#z80b-base-bar'),
        pumpBar: root.querySelector('#z80b-pump-bar'),
        baseLabel: root.querySelector('#z80b-base-label'),
        pumpLabel: root.querySelector('#z80b-pump-label'),
        eq1: root.querySelector('#z80b-eq1'),
        eq2: root.querySelector('#z80b-eq2'),
        eq3: root.querySelector('#z80b-eq3'),
        expl: root.querySelector('#z80b-expl')
    };

    let phase = 0;
    let latest = null;

    function fmt(value, digits) {
        return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
    }

    function area(diameter) {
        return Math.PI * diameter * diameter / 4;
    }

    function roundedRect(x, y, w, h, r) {
        const radius = Math.min(r, w / 2, h / 2);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x + radius, y);
        ctx.lineTo(x + w - radius, y);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y, x + w, y + radius);
        ctx.lineTo(x + w, y + h - radius);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x + w, y + h, x + w - radius, y + h);
        ctx.lineTo(x + radius, y + h);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y + h, x, y + h - radius);
        ctx.lineTo(x, y + radius);
        ctx.quadraticCurveTo(x, y, x + radius, y);
        ctx.closePath();
    }

    function compute() {
        const vdot = parseFloat(inputs.vdot.value);
        const zb = parseFloat(inputs.zb.value);
        const g = 9.81;
        const rho = 1000;
        const d1 = 0.25;
        const d2 = 0.20;
        const za = 10;
        const pa = 50000;
        const pb = 100000;
        const vA = vdot / area(d1);
        const vB = vdot / area(d2);
        const pHeadA = pa / (rho * g);
        const pHeadB = pb / (rho * g);
        const vHeadA = (vA * vA) / (2 * g);
        const vHeadB = (vB * vB) / (2 * g);
        const HA = pHeadA + vHeadA + za;
        const HB = pHeadB + vHeadB + zb;
        const HP = HB - HA;
        const baseShare = HB > 0 ? HA / HB : 0;
        const pumpShare = HB > 0 ? HP / HB : 0;
        return { vdot, zb, za, pHeadA, pHeadB, vA, vB, vHeadA, vHeadB, HA, HB, HP, baseShare, pumpShare };
    }

    function syncText(data) {
        labels.vdot.textContent = fmt(data.vdot, 2) + ' m^3/s';
        labels.zb.textContent = fmt(data.zb, 0) + ' m';

        out.va.textContent = fmt(data.vA, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.vb.textContent = fmt(data.vB, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.pah.textContent = fmt(data.pHeadA, 2) + ' m';
        out.pbh.textContent = fmt(data.pHeadB, 2) + ' m';
        out.ha.textContent = fmt(data.HA, 2) + ' m';
        out.hb.textContent = fmt(data.HB, 2) + ' m';
        out.ovHa.textContent = fmt(data.HA, 2) + ' m';
        out.ovHb.textContent = fmt(data.HB, 2) + ' m';
        out.ovHp.textContent = fmt(data.HP, 2) + ' m';

        out.baseBar.style.width = (data.baseShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.pumpBar.style.width = (data.pumpShare * 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.baseLabel.textContent = (data.baseShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
        out.pumpLabel.textContent = (data.pumpShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

        out.eq1.textContent = 'H_A = ' + fmt(data.pHeadA, 2) + ' + ' + fmt(data.vHeadA, 2) + ' + ' + fmt(data.za, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.HA, 2) + ' m';
        out.eq2.textContent = 'H_B = ' + fmt(data.pHeadB, 2) + ' + ' + fmt(data.vHeadB, 2) + ' + ' + fmt(data.zb, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.HB, 2) + ' m';
        out.eq3.textContent = 'H_p = ' + fmt(data.HB, 2) + ' - ' + fmt(data.HA, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.HP, 2) + ' m';

        if (data.pumpShare > 0.7) {
            out.expl.textContent = 'Većina potrebne izlazne energije ovdje dolazi od same pumpe. To znači da postojeća energija u točki A nije dovoljna za traženu visinu i tlak u B, pa pumpa mora nadoknaditi glavninu razlike od ' + fmt(data.HP, 2) + ' m.';
        } else {
            out.expl.textContent = 'U točki A već postoji značajan dio ukupne energije, ali pumpa ipak mora dodati ' + fmt(data.HP, 2) + ' m kako bi tok stigao do izlazne točke B na višoj koti i s većim ukupnim energetskim stanjem.';
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const head = 10;
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
        }
    }

    function drawStack(x, baseY, parts, title, totalText) {
        const width = 46;
        const scale = 7.5;
        let currentY = baseY;
        parts.forEach(function(part) {
            const height = Math.max(4, part.value * scale);
            currentY -= height;
            ctx.fillStyle = part.color;
            ctx.fillRect(x, currentY, width, height);
            ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.8)';
            ctx.lineWidth = 1;
            ctx.strokeRect(x, currentY, width, height);
        });
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#385873';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(x, currentY, width, baseY - currentY);
        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText(title, x - 2, baseY + 18);
        ctx.fillText(totalText, x - 6, currentY - 12);
    }

    function drawScene(data) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#e9f4ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const groundY = 446;
        const sceneScale = 8;
        const leftTank = { x: 38, y: groundY - 108, w: 110, h: 108 };
        const pipeY = groundY - data.za * sceneScale;
        const rightTank = { x: 360, y: groundY - data.zb * sceneScale - 78, w: 110, h: 110 };
        const pumpX = 255;
        const pumpY = pipeY;
        const energyBaseY = 422;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#dbeafe';
        ctx.fillRect(24, groundY + 6, canvas.width - 48, 10);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#e8f3fb';
        ctx.fillRect(leftTank.x, leftTank.y, leftTank.w, leftTank.h);
        ctx.fillRect(rightTank.x, rightTank.y, rightTank.w, rightTank.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a6f90';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(leftTank.x, leftTank.y, leftTank.w, leftTank.h);
        ctx.strokeRect(rightTank.x, rightTank.y, rightTank.w, rightTank.h);

        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.16)';
        ctx.fillRect(leftTank.x + 6, leftTank.y + 8, leftTank.w - 12, leftTank.h - 8);
        ctx.fillRect(rightTank.x + 6, rightTank.y + 16, rightTank.w - 12, rightTank.h - 16);

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.lineWidth = 18;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(leftTank.x + 52, leftTank.y + 40);
        ctx.lineTo(leftTank.x + 52, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(pumpX - 34, pipeY);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(pumpX + 34, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightTank.x + 55, pipeY);
        ctx.lineTo(rightTank.x + 55, rightTank.y + 38);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.fillStyle = '#0f172a';
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.arc(pumpX, pumpY, 30, 0, Math.PI * 2);
        ctx.fill();
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#7dd3fc';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2.5;
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.save();
        ctx.translate(pumpX, pumpY);
        ctx.rotate(phase * 0.08 + data.vdot * 8);
        for (let i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            ctx.rotate(Math.PI / 2);
            ctx.fillStyle = '#7dd3fc';
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.moveTo(0, 0);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(14, 4, 22, 0);
            ctx.quadraticCurveTo(14, -4, 0, 0);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        ctx.restore();

        const particleColor = '#3b82f6';
        for (let i = 0; i < 30; i++) {
            const pos = ((i / 30) + phase * (0.004 + data.vA * 0.0012)) % 1;
            let px, py;
            if (pos < 0.38) {
                px = leftTank.x + 52;
                py = leftTank.y + 40 - (pos / 0.38) * (leftTank.y + 40 - pipeY);
            } else {
                px = leftTank.x + 52 + ((pos - 0.38) / 0.62) * (pumpX - 86 - (leftTank.x + 52));
                py = pipeY;
            }
            ctx.fillStyle = particleColor;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2.2, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }
        for (let i = 0; i < 34; i++) {
            const pos = ((i / 34) + phase * (0.005 + data.vB * 0.0012)) % 1;
            let px, py;
            if (pos < 0.6) {
                px = pumpX + 34 + (pos / 0.6) * (rightTank.x + 55 - (pumpX + 34));
                py = pipeY;
            } else {
                px = rightTank.x + 55;
                py = pipeY + ((pos - 0.6) / 0.4) * (rightTank.y + 38 - pipeY);
            }
            ctx.fillStyle = particleColor;
            ctx.beginPath();
            ctx.arc(px, py, 2.3, 0, Math.PI * 2);
            ctx.fill();
        }

        drawArrow(pumpX - 86, pipeY, pumpX - 24, pipeY, '#1d4ed8', 4, 'v_A');
        drawArrow(pumpX + 42, pipeY, pumpX + 108, pipeY, '#ef4444', 4, 'v_B');
        drawArrow(pumpX + 6, pipeY - 70, pumpX + 6, pipeY - 18, '#f97316', 3.5, 'H_p');

        drawStack(548, energyBaseY, [
            { value: data.za, color: '#94a3b8' },
            { value: data.vHeadA, color: '#7dd3fc' },
            { value: data.pHeadA, color: '#3b82f6' }
        ], 'H_A', fmt(data.HA, 1) + ' m');

        drawStack(626, energyBaseY, [
            { value: data.zb, color: '#94a3b8' },
            { value: data.vHeadB, color: '#7dd3fc' },
            { value: data.pHeadB, color: '#3b82f6' }
        ], 'H_B', fmt(data.HB, 1) + ' m');

        ctx.strokeStyle = '#f97316';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(602, energyBaseY - data.HA * 7.5);
        ctx.lineTo(602, energyBaseY - data.HB * 7.5);
        ctx.stroke();
        drawArrow(602, energyBaseY - data.HA * 7.5, 602, energyBaseY - data.HB * 7.5, '#f97316', 3);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#36506b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('Točka A', leftTank.x + 18, leftTank.y - 12);
        ctx.fillText('Točka B', rightTank.x + 18, rightTank.y - 12);
        ctx.fillText('pumpa', pumpX - 16, pipeY + 52);
        ctx.fillText('z_A = ' + fmt(data.za, 0) + ' m', 144, pipeY - 18);
        ctx.fillText('z_B = ' + fmt(data.zb, 0) + ' m', rightTank.x - 8, rightTank.y - 30);
    }

    function update() {
        latest = compute();
        syncText(latest);
    }

    function loop() {
        phase += 1;
        if (latest) drawScene(latest);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
        input.addEventListener('input', update);
    });

    root.querySelector('#z80b-preset-base').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vdot.value = 0.15;
        inputs.zb.value = 20;
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z80b-preset-flow').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vdot.value = 0.24;
        inputs.zb.value = 20;
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z80b-preset-lift').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.vdot.value = 0.12;
        inputs.zb.value = 28;
        update();
    });

    update();
    loop();
})();
</script>
```

### Zadatak Z82 â€” Pad tlaka u cijevi {.unnumbered}

 
82. Ulje relativne gustoće 0,84 struji unutar cijevi na način prikazan na slici. Ukoliko ukupan pad visine dobave od točke 1 do točke 2 iznosi 2 m, potrebno je odrediti tlak u točki 2.


**Zadano:** $d_1 = 0,15 \, \text{m}, d_2 = 0,22 \, \text{m}, h_1 - h_2 = 2 \, \text{m}, p_1 = 450000 \, \text{Pa}, \dot{V} = 0,06 \, \text{m}^3\text{/s}, \bar{\rho}_u = 0,85$  
**Odrediti:** tlak $p_2$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv, gubici uslijed strujanja su zanemareni.

***

### Zadatak Z83 â€” Protok kroz sifon s gubicima {.unnumbered}

 
83. Sifonom promjera 50 mm dobavlja se ulje relativne gustoće 0,82 iz spremnika ulja, na način prikazan na slici. Ukoliko gubitak visine dobave od točke 1 do točke 2 iznosi 1,5 m, te od točke 2 do točke 3 iznosi 2,4 m, potrebno je odrediti volumenski protok ulja kroz sifon i tlak ulja u točki 2.


**Zadano:** $d = 0,05 \, \text{m}, h_1 = 2 \, \text{m}, h_2 = 5 \, \text{m}, \bar{\rho}_u = 0,82, h_{w1-2} = 1,5 \, \text{m}, h_{w2-3} = 2,4 \, \text{m}$  
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}, p_2$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv.

***

### Zadatak Z84 â€” Apsolutni tlak u vrhu sifona {.unnumbered}

 
84. Na slici je prikazan sifon koji dobavlja ulje relativne gustoće 0,84 iz spremnika u okolinu u kojoj vlada atmosferski tlak. Ukoliko je srednja brzina strujanja unutar cijevi v, pri čemu pad visine dobave od točke 1 do točke 2 iznosi $2v^2/2g$, te od točke 2 do točke 3 iznosi $3v^2/2g$, potrebno je odrediti volumenski protok kroz sifonsku cijev te apsolutni tlak u točki 2, pri čemu atmosferski tlak iznosi 101,325 kPa.


**Zadano:** $d = 0,076 \, \text{m}, h_1 = 1,5 \, \text{m}, h_2 = 4,5 \, \text{m}, \bar{\rho}_u = 0,84, h_{w1-2} = 2v^2/2g, h_{w2-3} = 3v^2/2g, p_{atm} = 101325 \, \text{Pa}$  
**Odrediti:** $\dot{V}, p_2$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv.

***

### Zadatak Z85 â€” Dinamika sifona i kavitacija {.unnumbered}

 
85. Nakon što je narinut dovoljan pretlak u spremniku da se uspostavi protok kroz sifon na slici, protok će se odvijati sve dok razina vode u spremniku ne dosegne razinu ravnine početka usisnog presjeka cijevi. Primjenom Bernoullijeve jednadžbe bez gubitaka, potrebno je dokazati da je za izlaznu brzinu v ovisi samo o gravitacijskoj komponenti ubrzanja g i visinskoj razlici $h_3$, te da će se najniži tlak (najveći podtlak) uspostaviti u točki 3, pri čemu će ovisiti o visinskoj razlici $h_2 + h_3$.


**Zadano:** $p_{atm}, h_1, h_2, h_3$  
**Odrediti:** $v_2, p_{min}$

**Pretpostavke:**
* Strujanje je stacionarno, fluid je nestlačiv, gubici uslijed strujanja su zanemareni.

**Rješenje (84):**
1. Bernoulli (1-3): $H_{1-3} = 6 \frac{v^2}{2g} \implies v = \mathbf{3,13 \text{ m/s}}$.

<hr class="widget-divider">
<p class="widget-naslov">⚙️ Interaktivni simulator</p>

```{=html}
<!-- WIDGET: Sifon i Kavitacija -->
<div id="z83-siphon-legacy" style="display:none;max-width: 900px; margin: 2rem auto; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; border-radius: 20px; padding: 30px; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 15px 45px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h4 style="text-align: center; color: #1a202c; margin-top: 0; margin-bottom: 25px; font-weight: 800;">🌀 Fizika sifona: Brzina, Podtlak i Kavitacija</h4>
    <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #eff6ff; border: 1px solid #bfdbfe; border-radius: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; color: #1e3a8a; font-size: 0.84rem; line-height: 1.55;">
        <strong>Kako čitati sifon:</strong> Pad prema izlazu <strong>h₃</strong> određuje brzinu toka, a ta brzina zatim zajedno s visinom vrha <strong>h₂</strong> spušta tlak u najvišoj točki. Kavitacija nastupa kada apsolutni tlak u vrhu padne ispod tlaka isparavanja odabrane tekućine.
    </div>
    <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr)); gap: 30px; align-items: start;">
        <div style="position: relative; background: #f8fafc; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #edf2f7; overflow: hidden; height: 450px;">
```
