```{=html}
            <canvas id="z83-siphon-canvas" width="500" height="450" style="width: 100%; height: 100%;"></canvas>
            <div id="z83-apex-info" style="position: absolute; left: 250px; top: 60px; transform: translateX(-50%); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 10px; border: 2px solid #3b82f6; text-align: center; min-width: 140px;">
                <div style="font-size: 0.65rem; font-weight: 800; color: #64748b;">TLAK U VRHU (abs)</div>
                <div id="z83-p-apex" style="font-size: 1.2rem; font-weight: 800; color: #1e40af;">92.5 kPa</div>
                <div id="z83-cavitation-warn" style="display: none; font-size: 0.65rem; color: #ef4444; font-weight: 900; animation: blink 1s infinite;">⚠️ KAVITACIJA!</div>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 15px;">
            <div style="padding: 18px; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 15px; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569;">Visina vrha h₂: <span id="z83-v-h2">3.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z83-h2-slider" min="1" max="12" step="0.1" value="3" style="width: 100%;">
                <label style="display: block; font-weight: 700; color: #475569; margin-top: 15px;">Pad sifona h₃: <span id="z83-v-h3">2.0</span> m</label>
                <input type="range" id="z83-h3-slider" min="0.5" max="6" step="0.1" value="2" style="width: 100%;">
                <select id="z83-fluid-select" style="width: 100%; margin-top: 15px; padding: 5px; border-radius: 6px;">
                    <option value="water">Voda (20°C)</option>
                    <option value="hot_water">Vruća voda (80°C)</option>
                    <option value="oil">Ulje</option>
                </select>
            </div>
            <div style="background: #ebf8ff; padding: 18px; border-radius: 15px; border-left: 6px solid #3182ce;">
                <div>Brzina v: <b id="z83-res-v">6.26 m/s</b></div>
                <div style="margin-top: 10px; height: 8px; background: #e2e8f0; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden; position: relative;">
                    <div id="z83-p-bar" style="position: absolute; right: 0; height: 100%; background: #3b82f6; width: 50%;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 12px;">
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">v²/2g</div>
                    <div id="z83-res-vhead" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.00 m</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">p_v</div>
                    <div id="z83-res-pv" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 kPa</div>
                </div>
                <div style="background: #ffffff; padding: 14px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #dbeafe; text-align: center;">
                    <div style="font-size: 0.72rem; color: #64748b; font-weight: 700;">Rezerva do kavitacije</div>
                    <div id="z83-res-margin" style="font-family: monospace; font-size: 0.95rem; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a;">0.0 kPa</div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <div style="padding: 14px 16px; background: #fff7ed; border: 1px solid #fdba74; border-radius: 12px; color: #7c2d12; font-size: 0.82rem; line-height: 1.55;">
                <strong>Tumačenje scene:</strong> <span id="z83-explainer"></span>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<style>@keyframes blink { 0% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: 0.3; } 100% { opacity: 1; } }</style>
<script>
(function() {
    const canvas = document.getElementById('z83-siphon-canvas'), ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const h2S = document.getElementById('z83-h2-slider'), h3S = document.getElementById('z83-h3-slider'), fluidS = document.getElementById('z83-fluid-select');
    let particles = []; for(let i=0; i<100; i++) particles.push(Math.random());
    function update() {
        const h2 = parseFloat(h2S.value), h3 = parseFloat(h3S.value), g = 9.81, patm = 101325;
        let rho = 1000, pv = 2330; if(fluidS.value==='hot_water'){rho=972; pv=47400;} else if(fluidS.value==='oil'){rho=850; pv=10;}
        const v = Math.sqrt(2*g*h3), p_apex_abs = patm - rho*g*h2 - 0.5*rho*v*v;
        const isCav = p_apex_abs <= pv;
        const vHead = v*v/(2*g);
        const margin = p_apex_abs - pv;
        document.getElementById('z83-v-h2').innerText = h2.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z83-v-h3').innerText = h3.toFixed(1);
        document.getElementById('z83-res-v').innerText = v.toFixed(2) + " m/s";
        document.getElementById('z83-p-apex').innerText = (Math.max(p_apex_abs,0)/1000).toFixed(1) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z83-res-vhead').innerText = vHead.toFixed(2) + " m";
        document.getElementById('z83-res-pv').innerText = (pv/1000).toFixed(2) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z83-res-margin').innerText = (margin/1000).toFixed(2) + " kPa";
        document.getElementById('z83-explainer').textContent = `Pad h₃ = ${h3.toFixed(1)} m daje brzinu ${v.toFixed(2)} m/s, odnosno brzinsku visinu ${vHead.toFixed(2)} m. U vrhu sifona tlak se smanjuje zbog geodetskog uspona h₂ = ${h2.toFixed(1)} m i zbog te brzinske visine, pa apsolutni tlak pada na ${(Math.max(p_apex_abs,0)/1000).toFixed(1)} kPa. Rezerva do tlaka isparavanja je ${(margin/1000).toFixed(2)} kPa${isCav ? ', zato počinje kavitacija.' : '.'}`;
        document.getElementById('z83-cavitation-warn').style.display = isCav ? 'block' : 'none';
        document.getElementById('z83-p-bar').style.width = Math.max((p_apex_abs/patm)*100, 0) + "%";
        draw(h2, h3, v, isCav);
    }
    function draw(h2, h3, v, isCav) {
        ctx.clearRect(0,0,500,450); const scale = 25, oy = 250, tubeX1 = 120, tubeX2 = 350, r = 40, topY = oy-h2*scale, botY = oy+h3*scale;
        ctx.fillStyle = "#ebf8ff"; ctx.fillRect(50,oy,150,150); ctx.strokeStyle="#475569"; ctx.lineWidth=3; ctx.strokeRect(50,oy,150,150);
        ctx.lineCap="round"; ctx.strokeStyle="#cbd5e0"; ctx.lineWidth=15; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(tubeX1,oy+50); ctx.lineTo(tubeX1,topY+r);
        ctx.arc(tubeX1+r,topY+r,r,Math.PI,1.5*Math.PI); ctx.lineTo(tubeX2-r,topY); ctx.arc(tubeX2-r,topY+r,r,1.5*Math.PI,2*Math.PI); ctx.lineTo(tubeX2,botY); ctx.stroke();
        if(!isCav) {
            ctx.strokeStyle="#3b82f6"; ctx.lineWidth=11; ctx.stroke();
            particles.forEach((p,i) => {
                particles[i]+=v*0.01; if(particles[i]>1) particles[i]=0; const pos=particles[i]; let px, py;
                if(pos<0.3){px=tubeX1; py=(oy+50)-pos/0.3*(oy+50-(topY+r));}
                else if(pos<0.4){const a=Math.PI+(pos-0.3)/0.1*Math.PI/2; px=tubeX1+r+r*Math.cos(a); py=topY+r+r*Math.sin(a);}
                else if(pos<0.6){px=tubeX1+r+(pos-0.4)/0.2*(tubeX2-r-(tubeX1+r)); py=topY;}
                else if(pos<0.7){const a=1.5*Math.PI+(pos-0.6)/0.1*Math.PI/2; px=tubeX2-r+r*Math.cos(a); py=topY+r+r*Math.sin(a);}
                else {px=tubeX2; py=topY+r+(pos-0.7)/0.3*(botY-(topY+r));}
                ctx.fillStyle="white"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(px,py,1.5,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();
            });
        } else { for(let i=0; i<20; i++){ctx.fillStyle="white"; ctx.beginPath(); ctx.arc(200+Math.random()*150,topY+(Math.random()-0.5)*10,2+Math.random()*3,0,Math.PI*2); ctx.fill();} }
    }
    h2S.oninput = update; h3S.oninput = update; fluidS.onchange = update; update();
    function anim() { update(); requestAnimationFrame(anim); } anim();
})();
</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id='z83-siphon-scene' style='max-width:1120px;margin:2rem auto;font-family:Inter,system-ui,sans-serif;color:#17324d;'>
    <style>
        #z83-siphon-scene *{box-sizing:border-box}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-shell{border:1px solid #dce8f4;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#ffffff 0%,#f7fbff 100%);box-shadow:0 24px 58px rgba(41,76,109,.1)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) auto;gap:1rem;align-items:start;padding:1.45rem 1.55rem 1rem;background:radial-gradient(circle at top right,rgba(59,130,246,.12),transparent 34%),linear-gradient(135deg,#eef8ff 0%,#ffffff 56%,#f4fbff 100%);border-bottom:1px solid rgba(43,92,124,.1)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-kicker{font-size:.74rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5d7b94;margin-bottom:.35rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-title{margin:0;font-size:clamp(1.38rem,2.4vw,1.92rem);line-height:1.08;color:#163c61}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-sub{margin:.55rem 0 0;max-width:72ch;color:#547088;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-chip{align-self:start;padding:.76rem .96rem;border-radius:999px;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f8ff,#fbfdff);color:#1d4f78;font-weight:800;font-size:.82rem;white-space:nowrap}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-note{margin:1rem 1.55rem 0;padding:.95rem 1rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #d7e8f8;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff7ff,#f8fbff);color:#2d587f;font-size:.86rem;line-height:1.6}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr);gap:1rem;padding:1rem 1.55rem 1.55rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-stage{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;padding:1rem;border-radius:22px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:radial-gradient(circle at top,#ffffff 0%,#eef6ff 68%,#e7f2fb 100%)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-stage canvas{display:block;width:100%;height:auto}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-overlay{position:static;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.75rem;padding:0;background:none;border:0;box-shadow:none}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-overlay div{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.35rem;padding:.85rem .92rem;border-radius:16px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);border:1px solid rgba(207,227,247,.98);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.06);font-size:.76rem;color:#3a5671}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-overlay strong{font-size:.72rem;letter-spacing:.04em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-overlay span{font-weight:800;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-state{position:static;align-self:flex-start;padding:.72rem .9rem;border-radius:16px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.94);box-shadow:0 12px 24px rgba(41,76,109,.08);font-size:.8rem;font-weight:800}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-state.safe{color:#0f766e;border-color:#99f6e4;background:rgba(240,253,250,.95)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-state.risk{color:#b45309;border-color:#fdba74;background:rgba(255,247,237,.96)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-state.cav{color:#b91c1c;border-color:#fca5a5;background:rgba(254,242,242,.96)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-side{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.9rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-card{border:1px solid #e3ebf2;border-radius:18px;background:#ffffff}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-controls{padding:1rem;display:grid;gap:.8rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-presets{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.5rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-preset{appearance:none;border:1px solid #cfe3f7;border-radius:999px;padding:.65rem .7rem;background:#eff7ff;color:#1d4f78;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .16s ease,box-shadow .16s ease}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-preset:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 10px 18px rgba(41,76,109,.08)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-row label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:700;color:#36506b}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-row input,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-row select{width:100%;accent-color:#2f80ed}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-row select{padding:.55rem .7rem;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #dbe6f0;background:#f8fbff;color:#163c61;font:inherit}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-metrics{padding:1rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr));gap:.7rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-metric{padding:.9rem;border-radius:16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#fbfdff 0%,#eef7ff 100%);border:1px solid rgba(31,91,150,.08)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-metric small{display:block;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.07em;color:#6a849a}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-metric strong{display:block;font-size:1.02rem;color:#123a63;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-bars,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-formula,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-explainer{padding:1rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-bars strong.section,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-formula strong.section,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-explainer strong.section{display:block;margin-bottom:.55rem;font-size:.76rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#66829a}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-bar-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:.35rem;font-size:.84rem;color:#36506b;font-weight:700}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-track{height:12px;border-radius:999px;background:#edf3f9;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:.85rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-fill{height:100%;width:0;border-radius:inherit;transition:width .28s ease}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-static{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#60a5fa,#2563eb)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-dynamic{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#f59e0b,#ef4444)}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-formula{font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58;color:#355771}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-formula div+div{margin-top:.45rem}
        #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-explainer{grid-column:1/-1;border-color:#bfdbfe;background:#eff6ff;color:#1e3a8a;font-size:.84rem;line-height:1.58}
        @media (max-width:980px){
            #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-head,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-chip{justify-self:start}
        }
        @media (max-width:640px){
            #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-presets,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-metrics,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-overlay,#z83-siphon-scene .z83b-side{grid-template-columns:1fr}
            #z83-siphon-scene .z83b-stage{padding:.85rem}
        }
    </style>
    <div class='z83b-shell'>
        <div class='z83b-head'>
            <div>
                <div class='z83b-kicker'>Z83-Z85 sifon i kavitacija</div>
                <h3 class='z83b-title'>Pad prema izlazu najprije stvara brzinu, a tek ta brzina zajedno s usponom vrha određuje koliko tlaka ostaje u najvišoj točki</h3>
                <p class='z83b-sub'>Lanac je ovdje strog: <strong>h<sub>3</sub></strong> daje brzinu <strong>v</strong>, iz nje slijedi brzinska visina <strong>v²/2g</strong>, a zatim Bernoulli oduzima i geodetski uspon <strong>h<sub>2</sub></strong> i dinamički doprinos od atmosferskog tlaka. Tek tada vidiš ostaje li vrh iznad tlaka isparavanja <strong>p<sub>v</sub></strong>.</p>
            </div>
            <div class='z83b-chip'>p<sub>apex</sub> = p<sub>atm</sub> - ρgh<sub>2</sub> - ρv²/2</div>
        </div>

        <div class='z83b-note'><strong>Kako čitati scenu:</strong> plava cijev prikazuje glavni tok, a desno pratiš kako se atmosferski tlak u vrhu “troši” na geodetski uspon i na brzinsku visinu. Kad preostali tlak padne ispod <strong>p<sub>v</sub></strong>, u vrhu se pojavljuje kavitacija.</div>

        <div class='z83b-grid'>
            <div class='z83b-stage'>
                <canvas id='z83b-canvas' width='720' height='520'></canvas>
                <div class='z83b-overlay'>
                    <div><strong>p<sub>apex</sub></strong><span id='z83b-ov-papex'>52.3 kPa</span></div>
                    <div><strong>p<sub>v</sub></strong><span id='z83b-ov-pv'>2.33 kPa</span></div>
                    <div><strong>Rezerva</strong><span id='z83b-ov-margin'>49.95 kPa</span></div>
                </div>
                <div id='z83b-state' class='z83b-state safe'>Siguran rad</div>
            </div>

            <div class='z83b-side'>
                <div class='z83b-card z83b-controls'>
                    <div class='z83b-presets'>
                        <button type='button' class='z83b-preset' id='z83b-preset-safe'>Sigurno</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z83b-preset' id='z83b-preset-edge'>Rubno</button>
                        <button type='button' class='z83b-preset' id='z83b-preset-cav'>Kavitacija</button>
                    </div>

                    <div class='z83b-row'><label for='z83b-h2'><span>Visina vrha h2</span><span id='z83b-h2-label'>3.0 m</span></label><input id='z83b-h2' type='range' min='1' max='12' step='0.1' value='3'></div>
                    <div class='z83b-row'><label for='z83b-h3'><span>Pad sifona h3</span><span id='z83b-h3-label'>2.0 m</span></label><input id='z83b-h3' type='range' min='0.5' max='6' step='0.1' value='2'></div>
                    <div class='z83b-row'><label for='z83b-fluid'><span>Tekućina</span><span id='z83b-fluid-label'>Voda (20°C)</span></label><select id='z83b-fluid'><option value='water'>Voda (20°C)</option><option value='hot_water'>Vruća voda (80°C)</option><option value='oil'>Ulje</option></select></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z83b-card z83b-metrics'>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>v</small><strong id='z83b-v'>6.26 m/s</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>v^2/2g</small><strong id='z83b-vhead'>2.00 m</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>p_apex</small><strong id='z83b-papex'>52.30 kPa</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>p_v</small><strong id='z83b-pv'>2.33 kPa</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>Pad zbog h2</small><strong id='z83b-static-drop'>29.43 kPa</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-metric'><small>Rezerva</small><strong id='z83b-margin'>49.95 kPa</strong></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z83b-card z83b-bars'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što troši tlak u vrhu?</strong>
                    <div class='z83b-bar-row'><span>Geodetski uspon h2</span><strong id='z83b-static-label'>29.1 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-track'><div id='z83b-static-bar' class='z83b-fill z83b-static'></div></div>
                    <div class='z83b-bar-row'><span>Brzinska komponenta</span><strong id='z83b-dynamic-label'>18.6 %</strong></div>
                    <div class='z83b-track'><div id='z83b-dynamic-bar' class='z83b-fill z83b-dynamic'></div></div>
                </div>

                <div class='z83b-card z83b-formula'>
                    <strong class='section'>Lanac Bernoullija</strong>
                    <div id='z83b-eq1'>v = sqrt(2gh3)</div>
                    <div id='z83b-eq2'>p_apex = p_atm - rho g h2 - rho v^2 / 2</div>
                    <div id='z83b-eq3'>Rezerva = p_apex - p_v</div>
                </div>

                <div class='z83b-card z83b-explainer'>
                    <strong class='section'>Što se sada događa</strong>
                    <div id='z83b-expl'>Pad prema izlazu daje brzinu, a kombinacija uspona i brzine zatim spušta tlak u vrhu. Dok je p_apex iznad p_v, sifon radi bez kavitacije.</div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>
<script>
(function() {
    const root = document.getElementById('z83-siphon-scene');
    if (!root) return;

    const canvas = root.querySelector('#z83b-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
    const inputs = {
        h2: root.querySelector('#z83b-h2'),
        h3: root.querySelector('#z83b-h3'),
        fluid: root.querySelector('#z83b-fluid')
    };
    const labels = {
        h2: root.querySelector('#z83b-h2-label'),
        h3: root.querySelector('#z83b-h3-label'),
        fluid: root.querySelector('#z83b-fluid-label')
    };
    const out = {
        v: root.querySelector('#z83b-v'),
        vhead: root.querySelector('#z83b-vhead'),
        papex: root.querySelector('#z83b-papex'),
        pv: root.querySelector('#z83b-pv'),
        staticDrop: root.querySelector('#z83b-static-drop'),
        margin: root.querySelector('#z83b-margin'),
        ovPapex: root.querySelector('#z83b-ov-papex'),
        ovPv: root.querySelector('#z83b-ov-pv'),
        ovMargin: root.querySelector('#z83b-ov-margin'),
        state: root.querySelector('#z83b-state'),
        staticBar: root.querySelector('#z83b-static-bar'),
        dynamicBar: root.querySelector('#z83b-dynamic-bar'),
        staticLabel: root.querySelector('#z83b-static-label'),
        dynamicLabel: root.querySelector('#z83b-dynamic-label'),
        eq1: root.querySelector('#z83b-eq1'),
        eq2: root.querySelector('#z83b-eq2'),
        eq3: root.querySelector('#z83b-eq3'),
        expl: root.querySelector('#z83b-expl')
    };

    let phase = 0;
    let latest = null;

    function fmt(value, digits) {
        return Number(value).toFixed(digits);
    }

    function fluidProps(key) {
        if (key === 'hot_water') {
            return { label: 'Vruća voda (80°C)', rho: 972, pv: 47400, color: '#f97316' };
        }
        if (key === 'oil') {
            return { label: 'Ulje', rho: 850, pv: 10, color: '#0f766e' };
        }
        return { label: 'Voda (20°C)', rho: 1000, pv: 2330, color: '#2563eb' };
    }

    function compute() {
        const h2 = parseFloat(inputs.h2.value);
        const h3 = parseFloat(inputs.h3.value);
        const props = fluidProps(inputs.fluid.value);
        const g = 9.81;
        const patm = 101325;
        const v = Math.sqrt(2 * g * h3);
        const vHead = (v * v) / (2 * g);
        const staticDrop = props.rho * g * h2;
        const dynamicDrop = 0.5 * props.rho * v * v;
        const pApexAbs = patm - staticDrop - dynamicDrop;
        const margin = pApexAbs - props.pv;
        const staticShare = staticDrop / patm;
        const dynamicShare = dynamicDrop / patm;
        return {
            h2, h3, props, g, patm, v, vHead, staticDrop, dynamicDrop, pApexAbs, margin, staticShare, dynamicShare,
            isCav: pApexAbs <= props.pv,
            isRisk: pApexAbs > props.pv && margin < 10000
        };
    }

    function syncText(data) {
        labels.h2.textContent = fmt(data.h2, 1) + ' m';
        labels.h3.textContent = fmt(data.h3, 1) + ' m';
        labels.fluid.textContent = data.props.label;

        out.v.textContent = fmt(data.v, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.vhead.textContent = fmt(data.vHead, 2) + ' m';
        out.papex.textContent = fmt(Math.max(data.pApexAbs, 0) / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.pv.textContent = fmt(data.props.pv / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.staticDrop.textContent = fmt(data.staticDrop / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.margin.textContent = fmt(data.margin / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.ovPapex.textContent = fmt(Math.max(data.pApexAbs, 0) / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.ovPv.textContent = fmt(data.props.pv / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.ovMargin.textContent = fmt(data.margin / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';

        out.staticBar.style.width = Math.min(data.staticShare * 100, 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.dynamicBar.style.width = Math.min(data.dynamicShare * 100, 100).toFixed(1) + '%';
        out.staticLabel.textContent = (data.staticShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';
        out.dynamicLabel.textContent = (data.dynamicShare * 100).toFixed(1) + ' %';

        out.eq1.textContent = 'v = sqrt(2 · 9.81 · ' + fmt(data.h3, 1) + ') = ' + fmt(data.v, 2) + ' m/s';
        out.eq2.textContent = 'p_apex = 101.33 - ' + fmt(data.staticDrop / 1000, 2) + ' - ' + fmt(data.dynamicDrop / 1000, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(Math.max(data.pApexAbs, 0) / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';
        out.eq3.textContent = 'Rezerva = ' + fmt(Math.max(data.pApexAbs, 0) / 1000, 2) + ' - ' + fmt(data.props.pv / 1000, 2) + ' = ' + fmt(data.margin / 1000, 2) + ' kPa';

        out.state.className = 'z83b-state ' + (data.isCav ? 'cav' : (data.isRisk ? 'risk' : 'safe'));
        out.state.textContent = data.isCav ? 'Kavitacija' : (data.isRisk ? 'Mala rezerva' : 'Siguran rad');

        if (data.isCav) {
            out.expl.textContent = 'Geodetski uspon i brzinska komponenta zajedno su potrošili više tlaka nego što je dopušteno za odabranu tekućinu. Zato p_apex pada ispod p_v i u vrhu sifona počinje kavitacija.';
        } else if (data.isRisk) {
            out.expl.textContent = 'Sifon još radi bez kavitacije, ali rezerva je mala. Svako dodatno povećanje h2 ili h3 može spustiti vršni tlak ispod p_v i prebaciti sustav u kavitaciju.';
        } else {
            out.expl.textContent = 'Pad h3 najprije daje brzinu ' + fmt(data.v, 2) + ' m/s, a zatim se u vrhu od atmosferskog tlaka oduzimaju i geodetski uspon i dinamički doprinos. Budući da je p_apex još iznad p_v, sifon radi bez kavitacije.';
        }
    }

    function drawArrow(x1, y1, x2, y2, color, width, label) {
        const angle = Math.atan2(y2 - y1, x2 - x1);
        const head = 10;
        ctx.strokeStyle = color;
        ctx.fillStyle = color;
        ctx.lineWidth = width;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x1, y1);
        ctx.lineTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(x2, y2);
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle - Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle - Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.lineTo(x2 - head * Math.cos(angle + Math.PI / 6), y2 - head * Math.sin(angle + Math.PI / 6));
        ctx.closePath();
        ctx.fill();
        if (label) {
            ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
            ctx.fillText(label, x1, y1 - 10);
        }
    }

    function drawScene(data) {
        ctx.clearRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const bg = ctx.createLinearGradient(0, 0, 0, canvas.height);
        bg.addColorStop(0, '#ffffff');
        bg.addColorStop(1, '#eaf5ff');
        ctx.fillStyle = bg;
        ctx.fillRect(0, 0, canvas.width, canvas.height);

        const groundY = 430;
        const scale = 28;
        const tank = { x: 46, y: groundY - 150, w: 160, h: 150 };
        const tubeX1 = 138;
        const tubeX2 = 364;
        const radius = 42;
        const crestY = groundY - data.h2 * scale - 64;
        const outletY = groundY + data.h3 * scale - 90;
        const fluidColor = data.isCav ? '#93c5fd' : data.props.color;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#e8f3fb';
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a6f90';
        ctx.lineWidth = 3;
        ctx.strokeRect(tank.x, tank.y, tank.w, tank.h);
        ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(59,130,246,0.14)';
        ctx.fillRect(tank.x + 6, tank.y + 10, tank.w - 12, tank.h - 10);

        ctx.lineCap = 'round';
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#cbd5e1';
        ctx.lineWidth = 18;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tubeX1, tank.y + 52);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX1, crestY + radius);
        ctx.arc(tubeX1 + radius, crestY + radius, radius, Math.PI, 1.5 * Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX2 - radius, crestY);
        ctx.arc(tubeX2 - radius, crestY + radius, radius, 1.5 * Math.PI, 2 * Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX2, outletY);
        ctx.stroke();

        ctx.strokeStyle = fluidColor;
        ctx.lineWidth = 11;
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(tubeX1, tank.y + 52);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX1, crestY + radius);
        ctx.arc(tubeX1 + radius, crestY + radius, radius, Math.PI, 1.5 * Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX2 - radius, crestY);
        ctx.arc(tubeX2 - radius, crestY + radius, radius, 1.5 * Math.PI, 2 * Math.PI);
        ctx.lineTo(tubeX2, outletY);
        ctx.stroke();

        if (!data.isCav) {
            for (let i = 0; i < 42; i++) {
                const pos = ((i / 42) + phase * (0.005 + data.v * 0.0014)) % 1;
                let px, py;
                if (pos < 0.26) {
                    px = tubeX1;
                    py = tank.y + 52 - (pos / 0.26) * (tank.y + 52 - (crestY + radius));
                } else if (pos < 0.38) {
                    const angle = Math.PI + ((pos - 0.26) / 0.12) * (Math.PI / 2);
                    px = tubeX1 + radius + radius * Math.cos(angle);
                    py = crestY + radius + radius * Math.sin(angle);
                } else if (pos < 0.62) {
                    px = tubeX1 + radius + ((pos - 0.38) / 0.24) * (tubeX2 - radius - (tubeX1 + radius));
                    py = crestY;
                } else if (pos < 0.74) {
                    const angle = 1.5 * Math.PI + ((pos - 0.62) / 0.12) * (Math.PI / 2);
                    px = tubeX2 - radius + radius * Math.cos(angle);
                    py = crestY + radius + radius * Math.sin(angle);
                } else {
                    px = tubeX2;
                    py = crestY + radius + ((pos - 0.74) / 0.26) * (outletY - (crestY + radius));
                }
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.9)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(px, py, 2.1, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        } else {
            for (let i = 0; i < 26; i++) {
                const x = 186 + Math.random() * 150;
                const y = crestY - 8 + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 18;
                ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.92)';
                ctx.beginPath();
                ctx.arc(x, y, 2 + Math.random() * 4, 0, Math.PI * 2);
                ctx.fill();
            }
        }

        const gaugeX = 560;
        const gaugeY = 112;
        const gaugeH = 270;
        const pApexClamped = Math.max(data.pApexAbs, 0);
        const remainingRatio = pApexClamped / data.patm;
        const vaporRatio = data.props.pv / data.patm;

        ctx.fillStyle = '#edf3f9';
        ctx.fillRect(gaugeX, gaugeY, 34, gaugeH);
        const gaugeGrad = ctx.createLinearGradient(gaugeX, gaugeY + gaugeH, gaugeX, gaugeY);
        gaugeGrad.addColorStop(0, '#f97316');
        gaugeGrad.addColorStop(1, '#2563eb');
        ctx.fillStyle = gaugeGrad;
        ctx.fillRect(gaugeX, gaugeY + gaugeH - gaugeH * remainingRatio, 34, gaugeH * remainingRatio);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#4a6f90';
        ctx.lineWidth = 2;
        ctx.strokeRect(gaugeX, gaugeY, 34, gaugeH);
        ctx.strokeStyle = '#ef4444';
        ctx.setLineDash([6, 4]);
        ctx.beginPath();
        ctx.moveTo(gaugeX - 8, gaugeY + gaugeH - gaugeH * vaporRatio);
        ctx.lineTo(gaugeX + 42, gaugeY + gaugeH - gaugeH * vaporRatio);
        ctx.stroke();
        ctx.setLineDash([]);

        ctx.fillStyle = '#36506b';
        ctx.font = 'bold 12px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('p_atm', gaugeX + 46, gaugeY + 8);
        ctx.fillText('p_v', gaugeX + 46, gaugeY + gaugeH - gaugeH * vaporRatio + 4);
        ctx.fillText('p_apex', gaugeX + 46, gaugeY + gaugeH - gaugeH * remainingRatio - 6);

        drawArrow(tubeX2 + 18, crestY + 22, tubeX2 + 18, outletY - 14, '#1d4ed8', 3.5, 'h3');
        drawArrow(tubeX1 + 24, tank.y + 20, tubeX1 + 24, crestY - 12, '#f97316', 3.2, 'h2');

        ctx.fillStyle = '#163c61';
        ctx.font = 'bold 13px Inter';
        ctx.fillText('vrh sifona', 228, crestY - 18);
        ctx.fillText('izlaz', tubeX2 - 16, outletY + 26);
        ctx.fillText('spremnik', tank.x + 32, tank.y - 12);
    }

    function update() {
        latest = compute();
        syncText(latest);
    }

    function loop() {
        phase += 1;
        if (latest) drawScene(latest);
        requestAnimationFrame(loop);
    }

    Object.values(inputs).forEach(function(input) {
        input.addEventListener('input', update);
        input.addEventListener('change', update);
    });

    root.querySelector('#z83b-preset-safe').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h2.value = 3.0;
        inputs.h3.value = 2.0;
        inputs.fluid.value = 'water';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z83b-preset-edge').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h2.value = 5.0;
        inputs.h3.value = 3.6;
        inputs.fluid.value = 'water';
        update();
    });
    root.querySelector('#z83b-preset-cav').addEventListener('click', function() {
        inputs.h2.value = 4.8;
        inputs.h3.value = 5.2;
        inputs.fluid.value = 'hot_water';
        update();
    });

    update();
    loop();
})();
</script>
```
